QUALITY WORKMANSHIP

We provide the highest quality metal roofing products, fantastic service and unbeatable value for money

A.M.J Metal Roofing strives to be Queensland’s leading roofing organisation. We promise to provide the highest quality workmanship, fair pricing and professional service to our customers.

We have an amazing track record of servicing our residential, commercial, insurance and body corporate related clients (just to name a few).

Our impressive reputation is built on accurate quotes, efficient completion of projects and our ability to make your roofing dream become a reality, whilst ensuring that your experience with our company is nothing but stress free and professional.

We take pride in the reputation that we have built and maintained within the roofing industry, of quality work and great customer service; both traits that we continue to extend with each and every job (regardless of the size) and are the reasons why we are your go-to metal roofing specialists!

Our company has a high focus on Workplace Health and Safety and the ongoing training of our workers and the safety of our workers and clients is our highest priority!

You don’t just get more up top with A.M.J, you get reliable and reputable metal roofing specialist who has you and your home’s best interests at heart!

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS (FAQs)

Can’t find the answer you are looking for? Call us on 1300 12 ROOF or use our online enquiry form here

How much does metal roofing cost in Brisbane?

This depends on a lot of factors i.e: type of roof being removed, height, roof pitch, access and type of new roof being installed. An average metal to metal re-roof would be in the range of 25k- 35k with removing tile roofs there is more work required and difficultly of logistics will reflect in the price.

How long does metal roofing last?

Installed correctly in line with codes and manufacturers specifications you can expect a metal roof to last 100 years. This would not apply to any external interferent i.e: corrosive environments, galvanic corrosion etc.

Can I get insulation installed under a metal roof?

Yes, insulation can be installed directly under your new roof so the barrier is at the roof line (and not at ceiling level. Anticondensation building blanket has been proven to be the most cost effective and efficient type of material for this application.

How do I know if my roof needs replacing?

Obvious leaks that occur. Home owners also find it simply good economics to replace an old roof than to continually repair and be always left with an old roof. Street appeal is also a huge factor as roofs can be 30% of what you see when you look at your house. It’s like putting on formal wear without doing your hair.

Can I change roof materials during a roof replacement?

We can change from what you have now to something else. Be aware that some profiles of new roof are not suitable in some applications and we are restricted to manufacturers specifications. Our process however is to go through options, so you are happy with the proposal and are left with a compliant result.

Can you replace a tiled roof with metal roofing?

Yes, you can in most cases. This will be assessed by our experienced Estimators and advice given to us by our engineers.

What happens if asbestos is found during roof replacement?

While we endeavour to predict most scenarios up front, If unidentified or hidden asbestos is found and needs to be removed, we will engage our team of professorial asbestos removalists to give a price to remove and dispose of safely.

Do you offer a warranty on re-roofing work?

We offer a full 10-year warranty on all of our complete roof replacements.

How long does a roof replacement take?

A normal house re-roof will take at least a week. This includes installation and dismantling of scaffolds or edge protections required.

Do I need council approval for a roof replacement in Brisbane?

All re-roofs that exceed 20% of the total roof are required to have council approval. This is done by our certifiers lodging a Building application. This is how it is ensured frame tie downs and general compliances are met.

ANY QUESTIONS?

A.M.J Metal Roofing Brisbane
4.8
Mitchell Watson
8 years ago
AMJ completed a roof replacement at our home. This involved removal of our old asbestos roof and replacing with a new colorbond roof, guttering and insulation. They also installed a new roof over our deck using insulated paneling.We were really happy with the end product and the care the AMJ team took in all their work. The team at AMJ kept us informed throughout the planning, the job was completed really quickly and I would recommend them to anyone.
Annavarium A
8 years ago
I was getting a Building and Pest inspection done on a house in Annerley I was looking at buying. Because of that storm cell that hit Annerley in 2014 I also had Dennis at A.M.J come out for a second opinion on the "tin" roof. The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, "No damage, the roof is good". Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo's later, he climb's back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I have contacted that company asking for a full refund! Again, thank you Dennis and A.M.J, very happy to recommend anyone to your company!! Cheers Mark @ Annerley

AMJ Metal Roofing replaced our terracotta tile roof with a new colorbond roof. Their detailed quote gave peace of mind during the entire process. AMJ covered every detail involved in carrying out this project. 5 star service throughout the entire AMJ team. We love our new roof, thank you!

We had had a number of people look at our (quite flat) roof over the years and your guys spent quite a while on the roof & said they knew what the problem was... The roof got tested with two big downpours - staff ready with buckets & sqeegees - we had no further leaks.3 works to describe AMJ? Efficient, competent, organized.You guys really know what youre doing...very well done!

AMJ was a great company to deal with. In 2011 I had the roof and guttering of my Sunnybank Hills property replaced by AMJ Metal Roofing. The roof withstood two severe hailstorms during the subsequent years with no damage or leaks.In 2017 I listed this property for sale and was required to supply a detailed independent building report which included an internal inspection of the roof. It was noted during this inspection that a small number of screws were not fixed properly into one of the batons. I rang AMJ Roofing and within 48 hours a company representative had come to the property, replaced the screws and provided certification for the work. I was very pleased with the service 6 years after the original job.

Very, very happy

Nobody *wants* a leaking roof. But if you do end up facing that stressful situation, get a quote from AMJ. If you contract with AMJ Roofing you can be sure of a top quality finish using quality products. They recently replaced my 31yr old leaking tile roof with Colourbond and I could not be happier. The tradies were a lovely happy bunch of guys. I have a whole new house! When it rains I don’t have to go looking for the leaks.Alex was my supervisor and he was wonderful. Photos: tiles to Colourbond

a year ago
Our experience with AMJ can be summed up in one word: exceptional!The team demonstrated absolute professionalism while tackling a very complicated re-roofing project on a busy medical building. Despite the challenges of limited access and working above a live, fully operational medical center on a bustling road, AMJ managed the entire project seamlessly.We received constant updates throughout, and the customer service provided by Shanelle was second to none. The finished product is flawless, and we wouldn’t hesitate to recommend AMJ for any roofing project.We look forward to working with them again!
Redcliffe Gardens
a year ago
We want to thank AMJ Roofing for their professionalism. Extremely happy with the outcome.A big thank you to Ryan the supervisor who consistently were communicating with us to make sure the job is done of highest standard.Thank you to Emily from AMJ office who updated us with everything.We will highly recommend AMJ to all our family and friendThank you AMJ Roofing
Linda Petersen
a year ago
Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen

They did a fantastic job then, but when the cyclone hit this year (Feb 2025) we had a small leak into the bathroom ceiling.I contacted A.M.J about the problem and they were more than happy to come back do an inspection and organise a repair at no cost to us.In the end it turned out not to be the new roof installation that was the problem but an older section of roofing.I can't thank Cameron and everyone at A.M.J enough for the service, repair and follow up.

8 months ago

From the initial quotation right through to the site clean up, the AMJ team were extremely professional, keeping us fully informed every step and delivering on timelines.

A.M.J made getting a new roof simple and enjoyable. Right from the beginning quote to the clean up! Always on time and keeping you fully informed of the process throughout. Very reasonable quote…. no need to look further. We are very happy to give this company 5 stars and would recommend to anybody.
Nathan Yates
4 months ago
For what is a big investment into your biggest asset. I can highly recommend AMJ. The whole team were wonderful to deal with from start to finish. I had them come back to fix something up for me and they were prompt and efficient. Every one I dealt with was great and would encourage anyone who is thinking about taking a leap of faith to give AMJ a go. So happy with the result but most importantly the peace of mind before, during and after knowing I was getting the job done right.
Walter Yeung
4 months ago
It has now been two months since our tiled roof was replaced with Colorbond, and we could not be happier with both the process and the result. The new roof looks stunning and has truly enhanced our home. From the initial quotation to the final completion, AMJ demonstrated exceptional professionalism, organization, and project management. Every member of the team was courteous, efficient, and highly skilled. We were especially impressed when, during a thunderstorm at 3am, someone from AMJ came to inspect our roof—an extraordinary level of care that exceeded our expectations. We are genuinely grateful for the outstanding service and are very pleased we chose AMJ for our roofing project.
John Cutler
4 months ago
I did a lot of research to find a company to replace my tile roof with colorbond. AMJ were professional from office contacts to roofing staff, and job was completely in a timely manner with no issues. Price was acceptable, completed roof work of a good standard.
Simone Leslie
3 months ago
We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS (FAQs)

Can’t find the answer you are looking for? Call us on 1300 12 ROOF or use our online enquiry form [here](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/contact/)

### [How much does metal roofing cost in Brisbane?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193037510-d98f59ca-4395)

This depends on a lot of factors i.e: type of roof being removed, height, roof pitch, access and type of new roof being installed. An average metal to metal re-roof would be in the range of 25k- 35k with removing tile roofs there is more work required and difficultly of logistics will reflect in the price.

### [How long does metal roofing last?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193120679-a187b7bc-89e2)

Installed correctly in line with codes and manufacturers specifications you can expect a metal roof to last 100 years. This would not apply to any external interferent i.e: corrosive environments, galvanic corrosion etc.

### [Can I get insulation installed under a metal roof?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193137246-43dad73a-45ee)

Yes, insulation can be installed directly under your new roof so the barrier is at the roof line (and not at ceiling level. Anticondensation building blanket has been proven to be the most cost effective and efficient type of material for this application.

### [How do I know if my roof needs replacing?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193153790-cb176b93-8982)

Obvious leaks that occur. Home owners also find it simply good economics to replace an old roof than to continually repair and be always left with an old roof. Street appeal is also a huge factor as roofs can be 30% of what you see when you look at your house. It’s like putting on formal wear without doing your hair.

### [Can I change roof materials during a roof replacement?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193171080-384333ef-649a)

We can change from what you have now to something else. Be aware that some profiles of new roof are not suitable in some applications and we are restricted to manufacturers specifications. Our process however is to go through options, so you are happy with the proposal and are left with a compliant result.

### [Can you replace a tiled roof with metal roofing?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193185170-f68614b6-758d)

Yes, you can in most cases. This will be assessed by our experienced Estimators and advice given to us by our engineers.

### [What happens if asbestos is found during roof replacement?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193201276-ef0eec35-9b6f)

While we endeavour to predict most scenarios up front, If unidentified or hidden asbestos is found and needs to be removed, we will engage our team of professorial asbestos removalists to give a price to remove and dispose of safely.

### [Do you offer a warranty on re-roofing work?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193213019-e44e80e7-a756)

We offer a full 10-year warranty on all of our complete roof replacements.

### [How long does a roof replacement take?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193229422-cdf9a8dc-428a)

A normal house re-roof will take at least a week. This includes installation and dismantling of scaffolds or edge protections required.

### [Do I need council approval for a roof replacement in Brisbane?](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/\#1757193243593-a6975b34-b2dc)

All re-roofs that exceed 20% of the total roof are required to have council approval. This is done by our certifiers lodging a Building application. This is how it is ensured frame tie downs and general compliances are met.

The roof withstood two severe hailstorms during the subsequent years with no damage or leaks.In 2017 I listed this property for sale and was required to supply a detailed independent building report which included an internal inspection of the roof. It was noted during this inspection that a small number of screws were not fixed properly into one of the batons. I rang AMJ Roofing and within 48 hours a company representative had come to the property, replaced the screws and provided certification for the work. I was very pleased with the service 6 years after the original job.

Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. 3 months ago

We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

CHOOSE A.M.J.
METAL ROOFING

Get a Quote

Reliable and Reputable Metal Roofing Specialists

Our company has a high focus on Workplace, Health and Safety and the ongoing training of our workers. We value strong community support and endeavour to achieve minimal environmental impact by recycling all waste materials
A.M.J. Metal Roofing - YouTube
A.M.J. Metal RoofingVMP - Vision Media Post
VMP - Vision Media Post534 subscribers

Watch on

OUR MISSION

You don’t just get more up top with A.M.J, you get reliable and reputable metal roofing specialists
who has you and your homes best interest at heart

A.M.J Metal Roofing strives to be Queensland’s leading roofing organisation. We promise to provide the highest quality workmanship, fair pricing and professional service to our customers. We understand the importance of our customers’ satisfaction, as without them we would not be able to achieve our business goals.

The A.M.J Team work close together and appreciate the richness of individual contributions, partnerships and teamwork. We are a company who takes pride in the work we provide, our reputation and our lasting impression.

OUR GUARANTEE

We install all components of roofing, fascia and gutters to the manufacturer’s recommendations and in accordance with current Australian Standards

HIGH-QUALITY ROOFING SERVICES
A.M.J provides a 10 year written workmanship warranty on the installation of roofing, fascia and gutter on full roof replacements. This warrants any failure due to unsatisfactory workmanship completed to the roof and that A.M.J will rectify the problem at no extra cost.

In saying that, we hereby state that we will install all components of roofing, fascia and gutters to the manufacturer’s recommendations and in accordance with current Australian Standards.

MANUFACTURER’S WARRANTY
BlueScope Steel ensures that their quality products are backed up by offering a manufacturer’s warranty of up to 36 years. Warranties are available for BlueScope Steel materials used in fencing, guttering, sheds, garages, purlins, water tanks, decking, roofing, walling and house frames. Depending on eligibility and product application, BlueScope Steel warranties cover corrosion to perforation by natural weathering, as well as paint flake and peel.

APPLY FOR WARRANTYWARRANTY DURATION
we take Workplace, Health and Safety seriously

SAFETY MATTERS

We go above and beyond to ensure our employees and you, the client, are always protected. We take responsibility by implementing up to date safety procedures, licenses and insurances to ensure that we are always compliant with the latest Construction laws and legislations.

We ensure that all of our fully licensed and qualified workers are regularly inducted into our company’s policies, ensure that they complete all necessary safety documents prior to undertaking works on residential properties and we equip them with site specific safety forms and Safe Work Method Statements which are completed on all commercial job sites.

A.M.J hold a contractor’s license with the Queensland Building and Construction Commission (QBCC). The QBCC supports the growing Queensland community by providing general advice and regulation information to ensure the maintenance of proper building standards, remedies for defective building work.

## OUR MISSION

You don’t just get more up top with A.M.J, you get reliable and reputable metal roofing specialists

who has you and your homes best interest at heart

A.M.J Metal Roofing strives to be Queensland’s leading roofing organisation. We promise to provide the highest quality workmanship, fair pricing and professional service to our customers. We understand the importance of our customers’ satisfaction, as without them we would not be able to achieve our business goals.

The A.M.J Team work close together and appreciate the richness of individual contributions, partnerships and teamwork. We are a company who takes pride in the work we provide, our reputation and our lasting impression.

## OUR GUARANTEE

We install all components of roofing, fascia and gutters to the manufacturer’s recommendations and in accordance with current Australian Standards

**HIGH-QUALITY ROOFING SERVICES**

A.M.J provides a 10 year written workmanship warranty on the installation of roofing, fascia and gutter on full roof replacements. This warrants any failure due to unsatisfactory workmanship completed to the roof and that A.M.J will rectify the problem at no extra cost.

In saying that, we hereby state that we will install all components of roofing, fascia and gutters to the manufacturer’s recommendations and in accordance with current Australian Standards.

**MANUFACTURER’S WARRANTY**

BlueScope Steel ensures that their quality products are backed up by offering a manufacturer’s warranty of up to 36 years. Warranties are available for BlueScope Steel materials used in fencing, guttering, sheds, garages, purlins, water tanks, decking, roofing, walling and house frames. Depending on eligibility and product application, BlueScope Steel warranties cover corrosion to perforation by natural weathering, as well as paint flake and peel.

[APPLY FOR WARRANTY](https://warranties.bluescopesteel.com.au/site/) [WARRANTY DURATION](https://warranties.bluescopesteel.com.au/site/residential/warranty-estimator.html)

## SAFETY MATTERS

We go above and beyond to ensure our employees and you, the client, are always protected. We take responsibility by implementing up to date safety procedures, licenses and insurances to ensure that we are always compliant with the latest Construction laws and legislations.

We ensure that all of our fully licensed and qualified workers are regularly inducted into our company’s policies, ensure that they complete all necessary safety documents prior to undertaking works on residential properties and we equip them with site specific safety forms and Safe Work Method Statements which are completed on all commercial job sites.

A.M.J hold a contractor’s license with the Queensland Building and Construction Commission (QBCC). The QBCC supports the growing Queensland community by providing general advice and regulation information to ensure the maintenance of proper building standards, remedies for defective building work.

Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

CHOOSE A.M.J.
METAL ROOFING

Get a Quote

Reliable and Reputable Metal Roofing Specialists

Our company has a high focus on Workplace, Health and Safety and the ongoing training of our workers. We value strong community support and endeavour to achieve minimal environmental impact by recycling all waste materials
A.M.J. Metal Roofing - YouTube
A.M.J. Metal RoofingVMP - Vision Media Post
VMP - Vision Media Post534 subscribers

Watch on

OUR MISSION

You don’t just get more up top with A.M.J, you get reliable and reputable metal roofing specialists
who has you and your homes best interest at heart

A.M.J Metal Roofing strives to be Queensland’s leading roofing organisation. We promise to provide the highest quality workmanship, fair pricing and professional service to our customers. We understand the importance of our customers’ satisfaction, as without them we would not be able to achieve our business goals.

The A.M.J Team work close together and appreciate the richness of individual contributions, partnerships and teamwork. We are a company who takes pride in the work we provide, our reputation and our lasting impression.

OUR GUARANTEE

We install all components of roofing, fascia and gutters to the manufacturer’s recommendations and in accordance with current Australian Standards

HIGH-QUALITY ROOFING SERVICES
A.M.J provides a 10 year written workmanship warranty on the installation of roofing, fascia and gutter on full roof replacements. This warrants any failure due to unsatisfactory workmanship completed to the roof and that A.M.J will rectify the problem at no extra cost.

In saying that, we hereby state that we will install all components of roofing, fascia and gutters to the manufacturer’s recommendations and in accordance with current Australian Standards.

MANUFACTURER’S WARRANTY
BlueScope Steel ensures that their quality products are backed up by offering a manufacturer’s warranty of up to 36 years. Warranties are available for BlueScope Steel materials used in fencing, guttering, sheds, garages, purlins, water tanks, decking, roofing, walling and house frames. Depending on eligibility and product application, BlueScope Steel warranties cover corrosion to perforation by natural weathering, as well as paint flake and peel.

APPLY FOR WARRANTYWARRANTY DURATION
we take Workplace, Health and Safety seriously

SAFETY MATTERS

We go above and beyond to ensure our employees and you, the client, are always protected. We take responsibility by implementing up to date safety procedures, licenses and insurances to ensure that we are always compliant with the latest Construction laws and legislations.

We ensure that all of our fully licensed and qualified workers are regularly inducted into our company’s policies, ensure that they complete all necessary safety documents prior to undertaking works on residential properties and we equip them with site specific safety forms and Safe Work Method Statements which are completed on all commercial job sites.

A.M.J hold a contractor’s license with the Queensland Building and Construction Commission (QBCC). The QBCC supports the growing Queensland community by providing general advice and regulation information to ensure the maintenance of proper building standards, remedies for defective building work.

REQUEST A QUOTE

Call us on 1300 12 ROOF or fill out the form below to get you
one step closer to your free quote.

We’d love to work with you

The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, "No damage, the roof is good". Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo's later, he climb's back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen
Steven McKenna
8 months ago
A.M.J roofing replaced our old super 6 roofing with a colorbond roof in 2019. They did a fantastic job then, but when the cyclone hit this year (Feb 2025) we had a small leak into the bathroom ceiling.I contacted A.M.J about the problem and they were more than happy to come back do an inspection and organise a repair at no cost to us.In the end it turned out not to be the new roof installation that was the problem but an older section of roofing.I can't thank Cameron and everyone at A.M.J enough for the service, repair and follow up.
Jeanette Wren
8 months ago
AMJ were great from start to completion of our new roof. Office staff kept us informed throughout the process and the workmen were wonderful. Our roof looks great and the site was left clean and tidy. I would definitely recommend AMJ roofing.
Richard Hatcher
9 months ago
AMJ Metal Roofing just completed our roof and gutter replacement. We are extremely pleased with the results and throughly recommend the company. From the initial quotation right through to the site clean up, the AMJ team were extremely professional, keeping us fully informed every step and delivering on timelines.
James Braid
10 months ago
A.M.J made getting a new roof simple and enjoyable. Right from the beginning quote to the clean up! Always on time and keeping you fully informed of the process throughout. Very reasonable quote…. no need to look further. We are very happy to give this company 5 stars and would recommend to anybody.
Nathan Yates
4 months ago
For what is a big investment into your biggest asset. I can highly recommend AMJ. The whole team were wonderful to deal with from start to finish. I had them come back to fix something up for me and they were prompt and efficient. Every one I dealt with was great and would encourage anyone who is thinking about taking a leap of faith to give AMJ a go. So happy with the result but most importantly the peace of mind before, during and after knowing I was getting the job done right.
Walter Yeung
4 months ago
It has now been two months since our tiled roof was replaced with Colorbond, and we could not be happier with both the process and the result. The new roof looks stunning and has truly enhanced our home. From the initial quotation to the final completion, AMJ demonstrated exceptional professionalism, organization, and project management. Every member of the team was courteous, efficient, and highly skilled. We were especially impressed when, during a thunderstorm at 3am, someone from AMJ came to inspect our roof—an extraordinary level of care that exceeded our expectations. We are genuinely grateful for the outstanding service and are very pleased we chose AMJ for our roofing project.
John Cutler
4 months ago
I did a lot of research to find a company to replace my tile roof with colorbond. AMJ were professional from office contacts to roofing staff, and job was completely in a timely manner with no issues. Price was acceptable, completed roof work of a good standard.
Simone Leslie
3 months ago
We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

# **CHOOSE A.M.J.**   METAL ROOFING

[Get a Quote](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/contact/)

## Reliable and Reputable Metal Roofing Specialists

Our company has a high focus on Workplace, Health and Safety and the ongoing training of our workers. We value strong community support and endeavour to achieve minimal environmental impact by recycling all waste materials

## OUR MISSION

You don’t just get more up top with A.M.J, you get reliable and reputable metal roofing specialists

who has you and your homes best interest at heart

A.M.J Metal Roofing strives to be Queensland’s leading roofing organisation. We promise to provide the highest quality workmanship, fair pricing and professional service to our customers. We understand the importance of our customers’ satisfaction, as without them we would not be able to achieve our business goals.

The A.M.J Team work close together and appreciate the richness of individual contributions, partnerships and teamwork. We are a company who takes pride in the work we provide, our reputation and our lasting impression.

## OUR GUARANTEE

We install all components of roofing, fascia and gutters to the manufacturer’s recommendations and in accordance with current Australian Standards

**HIGH-QUALITY ROOFING SERVICES**

A.M.J provides a 10 year written workmanship warranty on the installation of roofing, fascia and gutter on full roof replacements. This warrants any failure due to unsatisfactory workmanship completed to the roof and that A.M.J will rectify the problem at no extra cost.

In saying that, we hereby state that we will install all components of roofing, fascia and gutters to the manufacturer’s recommendations and in accordance with current Australian Standards.

**MANUFACTURER’S WARRANTY**

BlueScope Steel ensures that their quality products are backed up by offering a manufacturer’s warranty of up to 36 years. Warranties are available for BlueScope Steel materials used in fencing, guttering, sheds, garages, purlins, water tanks, decking, roofing, walling and house frames. Depending on eligibility and product application, BlueScope Steel warranties cover corrosion to perforation by natural weathering, as well as paint flake and peel.

[APPLY FOR WARRANTY](https://warranties.bluescopesteel.com.au/site/) [WARRANTY DURATION](https://warranties.bluescopesteel.com.au/site/residential/warranty-estimator.html)

![](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/safety-matters-image@2x.jpg)

we take Workplace, Health and Safety seriously

## SAFETY MATTERS

We go above and beyond to ensure our employees and you, the client, are always protected. We take responsibility by implementing up to date safety procedures, licenses and insurances to ensure that we are always compliant with the latest Construction laws and legislations.

We ensure that all of our fully licensed and qualified workers are regularly inducted into our company’s policies, ensure that they complete all necessary safety documents prior to undertaking works on residential properties and we equip them with site specific safety forms and Safe Work Method Statements which are completed on all commercial job sites.

A.M.J hold a contractor’s license with the Queensland Building and Construction Commission (QBCC). The QBCC supports the growing Queensland community by providing general advice and regulation information to ensure the maintenance of proper building standards, remedies for defective building work.

AMJ completed a roof replacement at our home. This involved removal of our old asbestos roof and replacing with a new colorbond roof, guttering and insulation. They also installed a new roof over our deck using insulated paneling.We were really happy with the end product and the care the AMJ team took in all their work. The team at AMJ kept us informed throughout the planning, the job was completed really quickly and I would recommend them to anyone.

![Annavarium A](https://lh5.googleusercontent.com/-h8ODHs21mFQ/AAAAAAAAAAI/AAAAAAAAACI/sSLkPu9cRM8/s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo/photo.jpg)

[Annavarium A](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/118302078899267217565/reviews)

8 years ago

I was getting a Building and Pest inspection done on a house in Annerley I was looking at buying. Because of that storm cell that hit Annerley in 2014 I also had Dennis at A.M.J come out for a second opinion on the "tin" roof. The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, "No damage, the roof is good". Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo's later, he climb's back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I have contacted that company asking for a full refund! Again, thank you Dennis and A.M.J, very happy to recommend anyone to your company!! Cheers Mark @ Annerley

![Tracey Gaske](https://lh6.googleusercontent.com/-UdJB_gqu4h8/AAAAAAAAAAI/AAAAAAAAAAA/APUIFaNXmE4vOJkhTGD_XNd5FM6I21w0LA/s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo/photo.jpg)

[Tracey Gaske](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101937064702247567586/reviews)

9 years ago

AMJ Metal Roofing replaced our terracotta tile roof with a new colorbond roof. Their detailed quote gave peace of mind during the entire process. AMJ covered every detail involved in carrying out this project. 5 star service throughout the entire AMJ team. We love our new roof, thank you!

![Marg Comino](https://lh5.googleusercontent.com/-bPkRtXQTZd4/AAAAAAAAAAI/AAAAAAAAAAA/APUIFaOI8CXvCPatWrbuK7Tuc4fui5El3w/s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo/photo.jpg)

[Marg Comino](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110042816624617139610/reviews)

9 years ago

These guys were very efficient with your paperwork & contract...great to deal with! We had had a number of people look at our (quite flat) roof over the years and your guys spent quite a while on the roof & said they knew what the problem was... The roof got tested with two big downpours - staff ready with buckets & sqeegees - we had no further leaks.3 works to describe AMJ? Efficient, competent, organized.You guys really know what youre doing...very well done!

![Sue Walker](https://lh4.googleusercontent.com/-T_3KoOxugo8/AAAAAAAAAAI/AAAAAAAAABw/K5hs9_gdq2Q/s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo/photo.jpg)

[Sue Walker](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100243486162197016455/reviews)

9 years ago

AMJ was a great company to deal with. In 2011 I had the roof and guttering of my Sunnybank Hills property replaced by AMJ Metal Roofing. The new colour bond roof looked great and the job was completed with no disruption to our family and no rubbish left on site. The cost was very competitive. The roof withstood two severe hailstorms during the subsequent years with no damage or leaks.In 2017 I listed this property for sale and was required to supply a detailed independent building report which included an internal inspection of the roof. It was noted during this inspection that a small number of screws were not fixed properly into one of the batons. I rang AMJ Roofing and within 48 hours a company representative had come to the property, replaced the screws and provided certification for the work. I was very pleased with the service 6 years after the original job.

![Laura Ellis](https://lh4.googleusercontent.com/-pdGAHCYSOr4/AAAAAAAAAAI/AAAAAAAAABI/3ZnkWoYsy0o/s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo/photo.jpg)

[Laura Ellis](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110523238284649520588/reviews)

Could not recommend AMJ Metal roofing more. Their company and staff were amazing to deal with. From the first initial contact to get a quote through to the completion of the roof has been so easy. Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen

3 months ago

We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

JOIN OUR TEAM!

*EXPERIENCED ROOFING CREWS WANTED*

A.M.J Metal Roofing are looking for experienced, qualified metal roofing crews to become part of our team!

DO YOU HAVE THE FOLLOWING?
– Extensive metal roofing experience in both the residential and commercial sectors
– Knowledge and experience with gutters
– Asbestos roof removal licences will be highly regarded
– A roofing crew that delivers second to none workmanship and service
– Relevant insurances/licenses for you and your team
– Roofing related tools and reliable vehicle
– Strong understanding of safety requirements onsite
– A can-do attitude and amazing work ethic, ready for this year’s storm season!

SOUND LIKE YOU AND YOUR CREW? HIT US UP TODAY!

Give our office a call on 1300 12 ROOF to speak with our friendly team and arrange a meeting with our Constructions team for the potential of an immediate start!We have LOTS of opportunities for the right crews – trust us, this is an opportunity you don’t want to miss! ?

AMJ completed a roof replacement at our home. This involved removal of our old asbestos roof and replacing with a new colorbond roof, guttering and insulation. They also installed a new roof over our deck using insulated paneling.We were really happy with the end product and the care the AMJ team took in all their work. The team at AMJ kept us informed throughout the planning, the job was completed really quickly and I would recommend them to anyone.
Annavarium A
8 years ago
I was getting a Building and Pest inspection done on a house in Annerley I was looking at buying. Because of that storm cell that hit Annerley in 2014 I also had Dennis at A.M.J come out for a second opinion on the "tin" roof. The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, "No damage, the roof is good". Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo's later, he climb's back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I have contacted that company asking for a full refund! Again, thank you Dennis and A.M.J, very happy to recommend anyone to your company!! Cheers Mark @ Annerley
Tracey Gaske
9 years ago
AMJ Metal Roofing replaced our terracotta tile roof with a new colorbond roof. Their detailed quote gave peace of mind during the entire process. AMJ covered every detail involved in carrying out this project. 5 star service throughout the entire AMJ team. We love our new roof, thank you!
Marg Comino
9 years ago
These guys were very efficient with your paperwork & contract...great to deal with! We had had a number of people look at our (quite flat) roof over the years and your guys spent quite a while on the roof & said they knew what the problem was... The roof got tested with two big downpours - staff ready with buckets & sqeegees - we had no further leaks.3 works to describe AMJ? Efficient, competent, organized.You guys really know what youre doing...very well done!
Sue Walker
9 years ago
AMJ was a great company to deal with. In 2011 I had the roof and guttering of my Sunnybank Hills property replaced by AMJ Metal Roofing. The new colour bond roof looked great and the job was completed with no disruption to our family and no rubbish left on site. The cost was very competitive. The roof withstood two severe hailstorms during the subsequent years with no damage or leaks.In 2017 I listed this property for sale and was required to supply a detailed independent building report which included an internal inspection of the roof. It was noted during this inspection that a small number of screws were not fixed properly into one of the batons. I rang AMJ Roofing and within 48 hours a company representative had come to the property, replaced the screws and provided certification for the work. I was very pleased with the service 6 years after the original job.
Laura Ellis
9 years ago
Could not recommend AMJ Metal roofing more. Their company and staff were amazing to deal with. From the first initial contact to get a quote through to the completion of the roof has been so easy. From Jenna in the office who was easy to get in contact with and replied to emails and call very fast to Nigel who quoted, Matt who checked on the work process and all the tradies just made the entire process of replacing our old roof with a new metal roof so easy. We couldn't be happier with the work that was done. All the tradies were wonderful and polite, they would let us know what was happening each day with the work and the time frame was great from start to finish the work took 4 days.I would recommend AMJ Metal roofing to everyone who needs a new roof or just maintenance. Very, very happy
Jeremy Mackellar
9 years ago
Quality service, friendly professional staff, roof was completed on time with very neat finishing. Highly recommended
Matthew Savona
7 years ago
Thanks for our new roof!From the moment we first contacted AMJ, and right up until the roof was completed, we knew we had made the right decision to employ their services.Nigel provided us with an extremely thorough quote and offered us some helpful advice along the way. Nigel's quote actually involved him climbing onto the roof for a detailed inspection - unlike some quotes we received from others in the industry..Dennis then took the reigns and looked after us extremely well throughout the whole asbestos removal and subsequent roof installation process, and ensured that the finished product was exactly as had been quoted and was completed to a very high standard.Shanelle at their head office was always extremely thorough when assisting us with any queries we had and was always a pleasure to speak with. We are extremely happy with our new Zincalume roof. Not only does our home look fantastic, the internal house temperature during summer was significantly reduced once the new roof and insulation had been installed.Thank you to the team at AMJ for a job well done.Matt & JasMJ Renovations
Dirk Witteveen
7 years ago
We have had a very positive experience with AMJ. From the initial consultation with their sales person (Nigel), meeting one of the directors (Alan) to explain in detail their roofing solutions, dealing with their staff (James, Craig and others) through to their helpful administration staff (Shanelle) we have had exceptional service. Their pricing was very competitive and they delivered everything they said they would, on time and kept us well informed. I highly recommend them!Dirk Witteveen - Sheldon
Daniel Brennocks
7 years ago
Good job guys roof looks great would highly recommend these people to you good rates good work
P BERRY
7 years ago
We had to replace our deteriorated Cement Tiled roof and AMJ won the job after researching and comparing quotes from other companies. We are thrilled with the results of our new Colourbond metal roof. Nigel quoted and answered all questions we had, Shanelle was just as helpful from the Office, Dennis and the Team were punctual, friendly, very professional and left our yard tidy. The roof was on in 2 days with zero interruption to familly life. Dennis even saved us future heartache and expense when removing the existing solar hot water tank. It was too dodgy to put back up and he co-ordinated with the Plumber for installation of a new system. I was kept up to date with photos and text messages and phone calls before, during and after the job. We rate AMJ Roofing 10 out of 10 and would highly recommend the Team to anyone requiring a roofing specialist.
Thomas Burne
7 years ago
Excellent from start to finish. Nigel organised the quote and was very professional and the quote was competitive. Dennis coordinated the work from delivery, managing the site and clean up. Good communication, no fuss and very responsive to questions. Very happy with our full roof replacement on a 1926 Queenslander.
Steve Mendelle
7 years ago
Cameron was totally professional and competent. He advised us well. The speed with which the job was finished - a complete roof renewal - was just amazing. The work was done thoroughly, all rubbish was taken away speedily and the Manor red colorbond roof looks just like the advert; I stand and stare in amazement at the beauty of this new roof. I throughly recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.
Simon Cook
7 years ago
Thank you so much to the AMJ Team for our new roof!It was a great experience from meeting Nigel for the quote, talking with the team in the office and having our foreman Denis overseeing the job at every stage was seemless and professional. The team went to every length to ensure we were 100% happy with the job.We would throughly recommend AMJ to anyone wanting to transform their home or business.Thanks again, Simon and Emma.
Michael Brill
7 years ago
AMJ did a great job replacing my roof, from competitive pricing to the quality and speed of their work. Thank you!
Andrew Brown
7 years ago
AMJ did a fantastic job on quite a complicated job.Were happy to be heavily involved in the planning and provided a quality result on time.Would definitely recommend and would definitely use again.
John Clark
7 years ago
Very happy with our new colourbond roof. Thanks Graeme & the team.
Andrea Savas
6 years ago
We only had our gutters replaced so our job was not as big as some that AMJ do but we were still treated the same as if we were having our whole roof replaced. they did a great job and Shanelle in the office is an absolute treasusre to deal with. Would highly recommend.
Kennedy Rayani
6 years ago
They couldn't come too busy with the recent rains.Communication was good sent me email to let me know
Billie Jacinta
6 years ago
I am across road from building done in Kedron and am very impressed with the work prompt timing and very professional and thorough Well done guys
Erica Cockburn
5 years ago
We are very happy with the roof replacement performed by AMJ on our colonial style home. The tradesmen were a very talented, efficient and friendly group who worked together like a well oiled machine. Their supervisor Graham did a great job keeping us informed and updated and the job ran smoothly. We would not hesitate to recommend them to any one looking for metal roofers.
Robert Lester
2 years ago
AMJ Metal Roofing replaced my leaking corrugated roof. Done in a few days with crane and scaffolding. All stages closely scheduled and done in a highly efficient manner. May not be the cheapest but AMJ Metal Roofing is an outstanding company to deal with (and I am not gaining anything by submitting this review). My wife was similarly impressed with the thorough cleanup when the job was finished.
Lynda Dunstan
2 years ago
Great company to deal with so nice to talk with happy people who actually enjoy their work. They were very easy to talk to about our job and we are very happy with their work thank you for your help A.M.J. Metal Roofing.
Leigh Cooper
3 years ago
Nobody *wants* a leaking roof. But if you do end up facing that stressful situation, get a quote from AMJ. They weren’t the cheapest but they were the most professional and only ones out of three that really thought through the problem and came up with a clever and workable solution for the shoddy roof design and build at our place.All their staff have been great to work with - always on time, polite, contactable. They made a stressful situation much better for us.I’m hoping not to have any problems with this roof for many years but if I need help with another roof, I’ll be calling AMJ!
Imelda Bordiss
a year ago
If you contract with AMJ Roofing you can be sure of a top quality finish using quality products. They recently replaced my 31yr old leaking tile roof with Colourbond and I could not be happier. The tradies were a lovely happy bunch of guys. I have a whole new house! When it rains I don’t have to go looking for the leaks.Alex was my supervisor and he was wonderful. Kept me informed all the way. In fact, I think the guttering guy let him down, so Alex put on his tool belt and got the job done.You can’t go wrong with AMJ Roofing. Info: I am on the Gold Coast. Photos: tiles to Colourbond
Jordan Miller
a year ago
Our experience with AMJ can be summed up in one word: exceptional!The team demonstrated absolute professionalism while tackling a very complicated re-roofing project on a busy medical building. Despite the challenges of limited access and working above a live, fully operational medical center on a bustling road, AMJ managed the entire project seamlessly.We received constant updates throughout, and the customer service provided by Shanelle was second to none. The finished product is flawless, and we wouldn’t hesitate to recommend AMJ for any roofing project.We look forward to working with them again!
Redcliffe Gardens
a year ago
We want to thank AMJ Roofing for their professionalism. Extremely happy with the outcome.A big thank you to Ryan the supervisor who consistently were communicating with us to make sure the job is done of highest standard.Thank you to Emily from AMJ office who updated us with everything.We will highly recommend AMJ to all our family and friendThank you AMJ Roofing
Linda Petersen
a year ago
Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen
Steven McKenna
8 months ago
A.M.J roofing replaced our old super 6 roofing with a colorbond roof in 2019. They did a fantastic job then, but when the cyclone hit this year (Feb 2025) we had a small leak into the bathroom ceiling.I contacted A.M.J about the problem and they were more than happy to come back do an inspection and organise a repair at no cost to us.In the end it turned out not to be the new roof installation that was the problem but an older section of roofing.I can't thank Cameron and everyone at A.M.J enough for the service, repair and follow up.
Jeanette Wren
8 months ago
AMJ were great from start to completion of our new roof. Office staff kept us informed throughout the process and the workmen were wonderful. Our roof looks great and the site was left clean and tidy. I would definitely recommend AMJ roofing.
Richard Hatcher
9 months ago
AMJ Metal Roofing just completed our roof and gutter replacement. We are extremely pleased with the results and throughly recommend the company. From the initial quotation right through to the site clean up, the AMJ team were extremely professional, keeping us fully informed every step and delivering on timelines.
James Braid
10 months ago
A.M.J made getting a new roof simple and enjoyable. Right from the beginning quote to the clean up! Always on time and keeping you fully informed of the process throughout. Very reasonable quote…. no need to look further. We are very happy to give this company 5 stars and would recommend to anybody.
Nathan Yates
4 months ago
For what is a big investment into your biggest asset. I can highly recommend AMJ. The whole team were wonderful to deal with from start to finish. I had them come back to fix something up for me and they were prompt and efficient. Every one I dealt with was great and would encourage anyone who is thinking about taking a leap of faith to give AMJ a go. So happy with the result but most importantly the peace of mind before, during and after knowing I was getting the job done right.
Walter Yeung
4 months ago
It has now been two months since our tiled roof was replaced with Colorbond, and we could not be happier with both the process and the result. The new roof looks stunning and has truly enhanced our home. From the initial quotation to the final completion, AMJ demonstrated exceptional professionalism, organization, and project management. Every member of the team was courteous, efficient, and highly skilled. We were especially impressed when, during a thunderstorm at 3am, someone from AMJ came to inspect our roof—an extraordinary level of care that exceeded our expectations. We are genuinely grateful for the outstanding service and are very pleased we chose AMJ for our roofing project.
John Cutler
4 months ago
I did a lot of research to find a company to replace my tile roof with colorbond. AMJ were professional from office contacts to roofing staff, and job was completely in a timely manner with no issues. Price was acceptable, completed roof work of a good standard.
Simone Leslie
3 months ago
We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

JOIN OUR TEAM!

## **\*EXPERIENCED ROOFING CREWS WANTED\***

A.M.J Metal Roofing are looking for experienced, qualified metal roofing crews to become part of our team!

**DO YOU HAVE THE FOLLOWING?**– Extensive metal roofing experience in both the residential and commercial sectors

– Knowledge and experience with gutters

– Asbestos roof removal licences will be highly regarded

– A roofing crew that delivers second to none workmanship and service

– Relevant insurances/licenses for you and your team

– Roofing related tools and reliable vehicle

– Strong understanding of safety requirements onsite

– A can-do attitude and amazing work ethic, ready for this year’s storm season!

**SOUND LIKE YOU AND YOUR CREW? HIT US UP TODAY!**

Give our office a call on 1300 12 ROOF to speak with our friendly team and arrange a meeting with our Constructions team for the potential of an immediate start!We have LOTS of opportunities for the right crews – trust us, this is an opportunity you don’t want to miss! ?

**A.M.J Metal Roofing Pty Ltd**

Unit 1 / 286 Old Cleveland Road East, CAPALABA QLD 4157

Phone: [(07) 3823 2773](tel:+61738232773) OR [1300 12 7663](tel:1300127663)

Fax: [(07) 3823 2786](tel:+61738232786)

E-mail: [admin@amjmetalroofing.com.au](mailto:info@companyname.com)

QBCC Licence: 120 2330

NSW Licence: 266396C

I was getting a Building and Pest inspection done on a house in Annerley I was looking at buying. Because of that storm cell that hit Annerley in 2014 I also had Dennis at A.M.J come out for a second opinion on the "tin" roof. The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, "No damage, the roof is good". Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo's later, he climb's back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I have contacted that company asking for a full refund! Again, thank you Dennis and A.M.J, very happy to recommend anyone to your company!! Cheers Mark @ Annerley

Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen

We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.
