TESTIMONIALS

Get a Quote
“AMJ Metal roofing has just completed the re-roofing of a commercial property for us, I do not comment on many things but as a retired plumber I could not fault the whole process, from the quotation, the communication and the quality of the finished product it was exceptional. What is quite amazing is with the systems that you have in place the whole job was done while the property was tenanted. As a previous business owner I must commend you on the team that you have and from my experience the attitudes all come from the top so congratulations on a great team.”
Noel ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“AMJ Metal Roofing replaced my leaking corrugated roof. Done in a few days with crane and scaffolding. All stages closely scheduled and done in a highly efficient manner. May not be the cheapest but AMJ Metal Roofing is an outstanding company to deal with (and I am not gaining anything by submitting this review). My wife was similarly impressed with the thorough cleanup when the job was finished.”
Robert ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Everyone in AMJ is a pleasure to deal with. We had dealt with AMJ a few times over the years from our initial roof installation to installing a flashing etc. From the ladies in the office to the guys who come out for the job are always courteous, friendly and reliable. Highly recommended!”
Yas ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Nobody *wants* a leaking roof. But if you do end up facing that stressful situation, get a quote from AMJ. They weren’t the cheapest but they were the most professional and only ones out of three that really thought through the problem and came up with a clever and workable solution for the shoddy roof design and build at our place.

All their staff have been great to work with – always on time, polite, contactable. They made a stressful situation much better for us.

I’m hoping not to have any problems with this roof for many years but if I need help with another roof, I’ll be calling AMJ!”

Leigh ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Having had a tile roof that leaked for years, I was keen to replace it with a tin roof when I retired. I got several quotes, one of which was from AMJ. AMJ were not the cheapest quote, but the cheaper quotes had a couple of “extra if needed” clauses in them and AMJ included it all in their price. AMJ were also by far the most professional to deal with at the time of getting quotes, they showed up when they said they would, they were very prompt with my questions and requests for variations to the quote as I wrapped my head around what I eventually wanted. All of their workers were very professional and courteous, they kept in contact with me continuously as things progressed and small changes had to be made due to weather and so on. They made sure all the work was complete, and were prompt to deal with a couple of small issues at the end before they sent me the final invoice. All in all it was a very pleasant experience to deal with this company, my stress levels were low throughout, I always new what was going on and what to expect. I would highly recommend doing business with this company.”
Jack ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Appreciated the approachability of this company. Skilled workmanship. Honesty. Patience. Handled minor issues after completion with goodwill and righted them to my satisfaction.”
Kathryn ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I cannot recommend AMJ Metal Roofing enough. These guys removed our asbestos roof, replaced it with Colourbond and installed a fly-over roof over our rear deck. Nothing was an issue for these professionals. They were punctual, responsive and an absolute pleasure to deal with, thank you!”
Karyn ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“10 out of 10 for these guys! We had our tiled roof replaced with Colorbond and from the quote through to the finished job it was nothing short of brilliant. The girls in the office (Shanelle & Georgia) kept us well updated on everything, and Graeme, Stu and all the fellow’s did a very professional job all round! Very happy customers!”
Bryan ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“So helpful with my queries.”
Fiona ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Received a quote from A.M.J. to help make a decision on a house renovation. Mark was friendly and very helpful when he came to inspect the house. The quote came through quickly after. It was a pleasure to deal with.”
Tash ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“AMJ …. Professional, respectful. From the moment Cameron visited my home until the Supervisor Allan left site the experience during reroofing of my home was a stress free experience.

AMJ I thank you for a very professional job and Allan and crew were an amazing group of men.

Queries were always answered promptly and it was lovely to see these young men carry out their tasks with efficiency and give the impression they were happy to be at work.. Thank you Allan for coordinating your team in this manner.

Shanelle and Georgia thank you for being efficient and helpful in all aspects of the contract and solar issues.

In concluding I must say I am so happy that I chose AMJ and Australian Solar (Mick) for such a professional experience …. And would recommend these companies to anyone looking to have roof and solar works done without hassle…. Thanks guys so much appreciated.”

Margaret ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“We are very happy with the roof replacement performed by AMJ on our colonial style home. The tradesmen were a very talented, efficient and friendly group who worked together like a well oiled machine. Their supervisor Graham did a great job keeping us informed and updated and the job ran smoothly. We would not hesitate to recommend them to any one looking for metal roofers.”
Erica ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“AMJ recently completed a full roof replacement on one of our managed unit complex. From the initial quoting stage through to the completion of works, everyone on the AMJ team were wonderful to deal with. Pricing was competitive, high quality of workmanship and the customer service and communication was prompt and professional.”
Butler Co Estate Agents ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Very good communication from A.M.J from the start of the process with Graham, the job supervisor, being highly competent, cooperative, friendly and reliable. We are really happy with how quickly and efficiently the work was done and, hence, are very happy to recommend A.M.J for any roofing needs.”
Albert ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I recently had my roof damaged by hail and spoke with Shanelle at AMJ, she went above and beyond to answer my queries and gave me a roofing 101 rundown. She couldn’t have been more helpful. Without her help I would not have had the information I needed to go back to my insurer to get the roof I wanted – Just wanted to say Thanks for the great customer service Shanelle!”
Richelle ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“All staff were professional, pleasant and informative. Our roof was replaced over 2 days with minimal disruption to my family. On completion my yard was tidied back to its original state. Highly recommended.”
Tri 21 Series TV ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“We only had our gutters replaced so our job was not as big as some that AMJ do but we were still treated the same as if we were having our whole roof replaced. they did a great job and Shanelle in the office is an absolute treasure to deal with. Would highly recommend.”
Andrea ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“AMJ did a fantastic job on quite a complicated job. Were happy to be heavily involved in the planning and provided a quality result on time. Would definitely recommend and would definitely use again.”
Andrew ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“AMJ did a great job replacing my roof, from competitive pricing to the quality and speed of their work. Thank you!”
Michael ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Good job guys. Roof looks great would highly recommend these people to you good rates ,good work.”
Daniel ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“We had to replace our deteriorated Cement Tiled roof and AMJ won the job after researching and comparing quotes from other companies. We are thrilled with the results of our new Colourbond metal roof. Nigel quoted and answered all questions we had, Shanelle was just as helpful from the Office, Dennis and the Team were punctual, friendly, very professional and left our yard tidy. The roof was on in 2 days with zero interruption to familly life. Dennis even saved us future heartache and expense when removing the existing solar hot water tank. It was too dodgy to put back up and he co-ordinated with the Plumber for installation of a new system. I was kept up to date with photos and text messages and phone calls before, during and after the job. We rate AMJ Roofing 10 out of 10 and would highly recommend the Team to anyone requiring a roofing specialist.”
P. Berry ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Excellent from start to finish. Nigel organised the quote and was very professional and the quote was competitive. Dennis coordinated the work from delivery, managing the site and clean up. Good communication, no fuss and very responsive to questions. Very happy with our full roof replacement on a 1926 Queenslander.”
Thomas ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Cameron was totally professional and competent. He advised us well. The speed with which the job was finished – a complete roof renewal – was just amazing. The work was done thoroughly, all rubbish was taken away speedily and the Manor red colorbond roof looks just like the advert; I stand and stare in amazement at the beauty of this new roof. I throughly recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.”
Steve ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Thank you so much to the AMJ Team for our new roof!

“It was a great experience from meeting Nigel for the quote, talking with the team in the office and having our foreman Denis overseeing the job at every stage was seemless and professional. The team went to every length to ensure we were 100% happy with the job.

We would throughly recommend AMJ to anyone wanting to transform their home or business.

Thanks again, Simon and Emma.”

Simon ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“We have had a very positive experience with AMJ. From the initial consultation with their sales person (Nigel), meeting one of the directors (Alan) to explain in detail their roofing solutions, dealing with their staff (James, Craig and others) through to their helpful administration staff (Shanelle) we have had exceptional service. Their pricing was very competitive and they delivered everything they said they would, on time and kept us well informed. I highly recommend them!
Dirk Witteveen – Sheldon”
Dirk ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“The service provided by AMJ Metal Roofing was nothing less than spectacular.. from quote to sign off nothing but professionalism with attention to detail through the ROOF!!!”
Daniel ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Thanks for our new roof!

From the moment we first contacted AMJ, and right up until the roof was completed, we knew we had made the right decision to employ their services.
Nigel provided us with an extremely thorough quote and offered us some helpful advice along the way. Nigel’s quote actually involved him climbing onto the roof for a detailed inspection – unlike some quotes we received from others in the industry.

Dennis then took the reigns and looked after us extremely well throughout the whole asbestos removal and subsequent roof installation process, and ensured that the finished product was exactly as had been quoted and was completed to a very high standard.

Shanelle at their head office was always extremely thorough when assisting us with any queries we had and was always a pleasure to speak with.
We are extremely happy with our new Zincalume roof. Not only does our home look fantastic, the internal house temperature during summer was significantly reduced once the new roof and insulation had been installed.
Thank you to the team at AMJ for a job well done.”

Matt & Jas
MJ Renovations

Matthew ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I was getting a Building and Pest inspection done on a house in Annerley I was looking at buying. Because of that storm cell that hit Annerley in 2014 I also had Dennis at A.M.J come out for a second opinion on the “tin” roof. The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, “No damage, the roof is good”. Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo’s later, he climb’s back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I have contacted that company asking for a full refund! Again, thank you Dennis and A.M.J, very happy to recommend anyone to your company!! Cheers Mark @ Annerley”
Annavarium ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“AMJ Metal Roofing replaced our terracotta tile roof with a new colorbond roof. Their detailed quote gave peace of mind during the entire process. AMJ covered every detail involved in carrying out this project. 5 star service throughout the entire AMJ team. We love our new roof, thank you!”
Tracey ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“AMJ was a great company to deal with. In 2011 I had the roof and guttering of my Sunnybank Hills property replaced by AMJ Metal Roofing. The new colour bond roof looked great and the job was completed with no disruption to our family and no rubbish left on site. The cost was very competitive. The roof withstood two severe hailstorms during the subsequent years with no damage or leaks.

In 2017 I listed this property for sale and was required to supply a detailed independent building report which included an internal inspection of the roof. It was noted during this inspection that a small number of screws were not fixed properly into one of the batons. I rang AMJ Roofing and within 48 hours a company representative had come to the property, replaced the screws and provided certification for the work. I was very pleased with the service 6 years after the original job.”

Sue ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Could not recommend AMJ Metal roofing more. Their company and staff were amazing to deal with. From the first initial contact to get a quote through to the completion of the roof has been so easy. From Jenna in the office who was easy to get in contact with and replied to emails and call very fast to Nigel who quoted, Matt who checked on the work process and all the tradies just made the entire process of replacing our old roof with a new metal roof so easy. We couldn’t be happier with the work that was done.

All the tradies were wonderful and polite, they would let us know what was happening each day with the work and the time frame was great from start to finish the work took 4 days.

I would recommend AMJ Metal roofing to everyone who needs a new roof or just maintenance. Very, very happy.”

Laura ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“These guys were very efficient with your paperwork & contract…great to deal with! We had had a number of people look at our (quite flat) roof over the years and your guys spent quite a while on the roof & said they knew what the problem was… The roof got tested with two big downpours – staff ready with buckets & squegees – we had no further leaks. 3 works to describe AMJ Efficient, competent, organised. You guys really know what you’re doing…very well done!
Marg ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Quality service, friendly professional staff, roof was completed on time with very neat finishing. Highly recommended.”
Jeremy ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
5 stars for quality
5 stars for price
5 stars for service
5 stars for expertise
5 stars for the roof
5 stars for timing – everything done on time including contractors.

“We are incredibly happy dealing with A.M.J – honestly, we can’t believe it could have been that easy to change our roof. Every step of the process was easy and it was done so quickly. Jenna has been exceptional with the job management. A few little issues were noticed and A.M.J was more than willing to send someone out the next day to review and fix. The response and the entire job was simply perfect!

Our work was for replacement of a Decramastic roof on a 30 year-old split level house.”

Katherine ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“As the owner of JM built. We choose to contract AMJ metal roofing for all of our projects and renovations. Amj”s workmanship is top quality and being a builder I can always rely on Amj for prompt quoting and service. The team can manage any size project from the small to large scale construction. I personally believe AMJ metal roofing are well above there competitors when it comes to the finished product. Job sites are always left clean and they are always happy to work in with my building team.”
Joshua ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“AMJ Metal Roofing recently removed our old tile roof and replaced it with a new metal roof. The service and professionalism from start to finish was exemplary. They should be commended on their attention to detail and service. They made what we thought would be a nightmare to do, a painless and worthwhile exercise. Our neighbors are now wanting AMJ to work their magic on their old tile roof. So happy with the service and the result. Big thank you to Alan and the team, we are so happy with everything especially after the weekend’s rain.”
Anonymous ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Experiencing a roof leak during heavy rainfall is really stressful, especially on a weekend when its hard to find a contractor thats willing to help. AMJ made the experience a lot less stressful and made sure that my leaking roof was fixed before leaving. Now that’s what I call customer satisfaction!”
Nicklaus ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Excellent service and standard of work. Seamless project management and communication. Very responsive to any issues we experienced during the roof replacement. Great work team!”
SK ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I just wanted to say thanks to Jordan and the roofing team who completed our recent roof replacement for the professional and high quality job that was done. We could not have had a better team of guys, more friendly customer service, or attention to detail for our satisfaction. Jordan provided us with very professional support and coordination, and kept us regularly updated at every stage of the job. We could not have been happier with the work and would recommend AMJ to anyone.”
Dale ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Could not recommend AMJ Metal roofing more. Their company and staff were amazing to deal with. From the first initial contact to get a quote through to the completion of the roof has been so easy. From Jenna in the office who was easy to get in contact with and replied to emails and call very fast to Nigel who quoted, Matt who checked on the work process and all the tradies just made the entire process of replacing our old roof with a new metal roof so easy. We couldn’t be happier with the work that was done. All the tradies were wonderful and polite, they would let us know what was happening each day with the work and the time frame was great from start to finish the work took 4 days. I would recommend AMJ Metal roofing to everyone who needs a new roof or just maintenance. Very, very happy”
Laura ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“From start to finish Jenna and the team at AMJ were a pleasure to deal with. We ended up requiring a full roof replacement, AMJ dealt with both our office and our tenant in a professional manner and the whole process ran smoothly. I would recommend these guys to anyone requiring a new roof or even repairs. I would not hesitate to ask AMJ for help with any of our rental properties in the future.”
Hero ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Highgate Hill Property Management
“Your company & staff were very efficient with your paperwork & contract…great to deal with! We had had a number of people look at our (quite flat) roof over the years and your company spent quite a while on the roof & the guy said he knew what the problem was… really knew what they were doing. The roof got tested with two big downpours & we’ve had no further leaks. 3 works to describe AMJ? Efficient, competent, organized. You guys really know what you’re doing…very well done!”
Margaret ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I can’t praise these guys enough. We had AMJ Metal Roofing out to repair a leaking section to our roof about 12 months ago. They were professional in their communication, documentation and workmanship. Last night, during the effects of Ex-Cyclone Debbie, we had another leak from a section of earlier work poorly done by another company. AMJ were out in a heartbeat; even in the aftermath of the storm to check his work and promptly repaired the poor workmanship of the other company for us. Extremely happy and would have no hesitate recommending them to others.”
Katrina ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“Excellent! This was a non standard job. Everything from quote to finish went exceptionally well. Office staff, very helpful…timely on getting back. Installation was done with care and precision. When builder had ‘situations’ AMJ was understanding and timely in getting the roof up. A good crew! Overall I would offer a strong recommendation.”
Bob ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“What a beautiful job all the boys have done for me, never have had such polite and CLEAN men at my home before. I have been handing [A.M.J’s] cards out. There are a lot of these roofs in this area. I now have a new house! All I want now is a big tarp to cover it at night so it doesn’t get wet or dirty, Love it. You all have been so kind to me and I am so impressed, [and] I sort of have a big mouth and I’ll let everyone know how AMJ were so good to me. I thank you all again and will be letting everyone know to go to you.”
Di-Ann ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Hartleys Body Corporate Management have used A.M.J Metal Roofing for a large number of jobs across our portfolio and have always found them to be prompt, reliable and cost effective. Our managers are comfortable in recommending them to clients given their track record of quality assurance and great customer service.
Hartleys Body Corporate Management ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I was recommended AMJ by family who had used them 12 months previous. Glad that I took their advice. AMJ was helpful and professional, responding to all my questions and did a good quality job in the time agreed.”
Adrian ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I have been meaning to sit down and send a big thank you to your admin, sales and roofing installation team. You were all very professional and prompt, very much missing in a lot of businesses today. Your installation team worked together in moving our solar hot water services and even fixed a leak in our deck roof. I could not have got a better company to renew my corrugated roof. I am in sales (blinds and awnings) and have recommended your company to two of my customers thinking of doing roof repairs. Again, a big thank you.”
George ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I recently needed to have my corrugated iron roof replaced and was put in touch with AMJ Metal Roofing. They went to considerable trouble to understand what I wanted, offered a number of innovative alternatives, to allow me to determine which choice would be the best option for my particular situation. I compared the quotes I received from AMJ and others and decided that AMJ’s quote was the most cost effective. They arrived when they said they would to carry out the work of stripping off the old roof and fitting the new one.The team of 4 people worked extremely effectively to complete the work the next day, to a very high standard.The day after that, all the old materials were removed as contracted. I have no hesitation in recommending this Company for the service they provide. Thankyou very much to all the people in the office and the Installers at AMJ who were involved with this job for the excellent way every step of the process was handled.”
Andy ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I would like to thank yourself and the AMJ organisation for your professionalism in regards to this project. AMJ were the only one of three well-known companies who replied to our request for a quote, although one company sent a rep around three weeks later! The quote arrives when promised and Steven was very attentive to my request in negotiation on the quote. The roofing team were polite, friendly and worked hard to complete the job as soon as possible. Throughout the process the yard and surroundings were kept clean and tidy. The old roof was picked up the day after the job was finished and not a hint of what had occurred was apparent. At all times we were kept advised when things were going to happen! I would be happy to recommend AMJ to anyone considering a roof replacement.”
Sandy ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“To AMJ Metal Roofing, It is with pleasure that we recommend AMJ Metal Roofing. We had our patio roofs, gutters and downpipes replaced by this Company. Dealing with all the staff involved including Jenna, the administration assistant all kept us informed from the outset to the finishing of the job including the warranties. Steve, the company sales representative also went to great lengths to advise and assist and also Alan, the Constructions Manager ensured we were happy all the way through the job. We have no hesitation in recommending AMJ Metal Roofing for any job whether small or large.”
Liam & Catherine ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“I am extremely happy with my new roof. All the people who worked on it were great and I really appreciated the final inspection by Alan when everything was made perfect. I would like to say a special thank you to the person who made up new guttering ‘decorations’ for the front of the house. It was very kind of him and speaks volumes for the type of customer service your company provides. The service at my home was backed up quick and efficient service from the office. It was a difficult time for me recovering from sudden surgery and I can’t thank everybody enough for making it so easy and pleasant for me. It goes without saying that I would be very happy to recommend your company to others.”
Moria ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“The team from A.M.J were professional and efficient and with their no fuss attitude were a pleasure to deal with. Keep up the good work and Manson Homes look forward to working with the team in the future.”
Managing Director ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Manson Homes
“A.M.J were highly professional, provided very efficient service, pleasant, friendly arrangements and a very positive experience. They are truly an outstanding business model.”
Avril ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Manson Homes
“We recently had three of our workshop roofs where the clear sheets and gutters were replaced. The great news is there is no leaks after recent rain and this makes me very happy. Even better news is the staff are amazed how much light is now coming into the workshop – after removing the old fibreglass clear sheets which had deteriorated over many years. All happy – thanks for your prompt quotes and completion of the work without issues! Much appreciated.”
Jennifer ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“We wish to commend A.M.J Metal Roofing for the work which they performed for our company for one of our projects. We commend them for the high quality of their work as well as for their approach to their professional services which they displayed during our business interaction. We have every intention of using them for our future projects.”
Manager ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Topline Homes Pty Ltd
“AMJ Metal Roofing were the best experience I have had with any contractors. They were quick with the quoting process and they were even quicker getting the job done. Being a re-roof, I was worried about it maybe raining but they were too fast to be worried about that. Awesome job, looks great and for a reasonable price!”
Peter ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Topline Homes Pty Ltd
“From start to finish, A.M.J Metal Roofing were a pleasure to deal with.  Our whole house and quite a large carport were re-roofed to the highest stardards. The roof was showing some signs of rusting and as well, most of the fastenings were rusting. The job was done with minimum inconvenience and in a timely manner.

The existing guttering was replaced as it was not capable of carrying heavy rainfall due to the existing pitch of the roof.  Staff explained everything as they went and we could not speak more highly of them – from the Receptionist to the Supervisors.”

Peter & Margaret ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Topline Homes Pty Ltd

8 years ago
AMJ completed a roof replacement at our home. This involved removal of our old asbestos roof and replacing with a new colorbond roof, guttering and insulation. They also installed a new roof over our deck using insulated paneling.We were really happy with the end product and the care the AMJ team took in all their work. The team at AMJ kept us informed throughout the planning, the job was completed really quickly and I would recommend them to anyone.
Annavarium A
8 years ago
I was getting a Building and Pest inspection done on a house in Annerley I was looking at buying. Because of that storm cell that hit Annerley in 2014 I also had Dennis at A.M.J come out for a second opinion on the "tin" roof. The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, "No damage, the roof is good". Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo's later, he climb's back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I have contacted that company asking for a full refund! Again, thank you Dennis and A.M.J, very happy to recommend anyone to your company!! Cheers Mark @ Annerley
Tracey Gaske
9 years ago
AMJ Metal Roofing replaced our terracotta tile roof with a new colorbond roof. Their detailed quote gave peace of mind during the entire process. AMJ covered every detail involved in carrying out this project. 5 star service throughout the entire AMJ team. We love our new roof, thank you!
Marg Comino
9 years ago
These guys were very efficient with your paperwork & contract...great to deal with! We had had a number of people look at our (quite flat) roof over the years and your guys spent quite a while on the roof & said they knew what the problem was... The roof got tested with two big downpours - staff ready with buckets & sqeegees - we had no further leaks.3 works to describe AMJ? Efficient, competent, organized.You guys really know what youre doing...very well done!
Sue Walker
9 years ago
AMJ was a great company to deal with. In 2011 I had the roof and guttering of my Sunnybank Hills property replaced by AMJ Metal Roofing. The new colour bond roof looked great and the job was completed with no disruption to our family and no rubbish left on site. The cost was very competitive. The roof withstood two severe hailstorms during the subsequent years with no damage or leaks.In 2017 I listed this property for sale and was required to supply a detailed independent building report which included an internal inspection of the roof. It was noted during this inspection that a small number of screws were not fixed properly into one of the batons. I rang AMJ Roofing and within 48 hours a company representative had come to the property, replaced the screws and provided certification for the work. I was very pleased with the service 6 years after the original job.
Laura Ellis
9 years ago
Could not recommend AMJ Metal roofing more. Their company and staff were amazing to deal with. From the first initial contact to get a quote through to the completion of the roof has been so easy. From Jenna in the office who was easy to get in contact with and replied to emails and call very fast to Nigel who quoted, Matt who checked on the work process and all the tradies just made the entire process of replacing our old roof with a new metal roof so easy. We couldn't be happier with the work that was done. All the tradies were wonderful and polite, they would let us know what was happening each day with the work and the time frame was great from start to finish the work took 4 days.I would recommend AMJ Metal roofing to everyone who needs a new roof or just maintenance. Very, very happy
Jeremy Mackellar
9 years ago
Quality service, friendly professional staff, roof was completed on time with very neat finishing. Highly recommended
Matthew Savona
7 years ago
Thanks for our new roof!From the moment we first contacted AMJ, and right up until the roof was completed, we knew we had made the right decision to employ their services.Nigel provided us with an extremely thorough quote and offered us some helpful advice along the way. Nigel's quote actually involved him climbing onto the roof for a detailed inspection - unlike some quotes we received from others in the industry..Dennis then took the reigns and looked after us extremely well throughout the whole asbestos removal and subsequent roof installation process, and ensured that the finished product was exactly as had been quoted and was completed to a very high standard.Shanelle at their head office was always extremely thorough when assisting us with any queries we had and was always a pleasure to speak with. We are extremely happy with our new Zincalume roof. Not only does our home look fantastic, the internal house temperature during summer was significantly reduced once the new roof and insulation had been installed.Thank you to the team at AMJ for a job well done.Matt & JasMJ Renovations
Dirk Witteveen
7 years ago
We have had a very positive experience with AMJ. From the initial consultation with their sales person (Nigel), meeting one of the directors (Alan) to explain in detail their roofing solutions, dealing with their staff (James, Craig and others) through to their helpful administration staff (Shanelle) we have had exceptional service. Their pricing was very competitive and they delivered everything they said they would, on time and kept us well informed. I highly recommend them!Dirk Witteveen - Sheldon
Daniel Brennocks
7 years ago
Good job guys roof looks great would highly recommend these people to you good rates good work
P BERRY
7 years ago
We had to replace our deteriorated Cement Tiled roof and AMJ won the job after researching and comparing quotes from other companies. We are thrilled with the results of our new Colourbond metal roof. Nigel quoted and answered all questions we had, Shanelle was just as helpful from the Office, Dennis and the Team were punctual, friendly, very professional and left our yard tidy. The roof was on in 2 days with zero interruption to familly life. Dennis even saved us future heartache and expense when removing the existing solar hot water tank. It was too dodgy to put back up and he co-ordinated with the Plumber for installation of a new system. I was kept up to date with photos and text messages and phone calls before, during and after the job. We rate AMJ Roofing 10 out of 10 and would highly recommend the Team to anyone requiring a roofing specialist.
Thomas Burne
7 years ago
Excellent from start to finish. Nigel organised the quote and was very professional and the quote was competitive. Dennis coordinated the work from delivery, managing the site and clean up. Good communication, no fuss and very responsive to questions. Very happy with our full roof replacement on a 1926 Queenslander.
Steve Mendelle
7 years ago
Cameron was totally professional and competent. He advised us well. The speed with which the job was finished - a complete roof renewal - was just amazing. The work was done thoroughly, all rubbish was taken away speedily and the Manor red colorbond roof looks just like the advert; I stand and stare in amazement at the beauty of this new roof. I throughly recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.
Simon Cook
7 years ago
Thank you so much to the AMJ Team for our new roof!It was a great experience from meeting Nigel for the quote, talking with the team in the office and having our foreman Denis overseeing the job at every stage was seemless and professional. The team went to every length to ensure we were 100% happy with the job.We would throughly recommend AMJ to anyone wanting to transform their home or business.Thanks again, Simon and Emma.
Michael Brill
7 years ago
AMJ did a great job replacing my roof, from competitive pricing to the quality and speed of their work. Thank you!
Andrew Brown
7 years ago
AMJ did a fantastic job on quite a complicated job.Were happy to be heavily involved in the planning and provided a quality result on time.Would definitely recommend and would definitely use again.
John Clark
7 years ago
Very happy with our new colourbond roof. Thanks Graeme & the team.
Andrea Savas
6 years ago
We only had our gutters replaced so our job was not as big as some that AMJ do but we were still treated the same as if we were having our whole roof replaced. they did a great job and Shanelle in the office is an absolute treasusre to deal with. Would highly recommend.
Kennedy Rayani
6 years ago
They couldn't come too busy with the recent rains.Communication was good sent me email to let me know
Billie Jacinta
6 years ago
I am across road from building done in Kedron and am very impressed with the work prompt timing and very professional and thorough Well done guys
Erica Cockburn
5 years ago
We are very happy with the roof replacement performed by AMJ on our colonial style home. The tradesmen were a very talented, efficient and friendly group who worked together like a well oiled machine. Their supervisor Graham did a great job keeping us informed and updated and the job ran smoothly. We would not hesitate to recommend them to any one looking for metal roofers.
Robert Lester
2 years ago
AMJ Metal Roofing replaced my leaking corrugated roof. Done in a few days with crane and scaffolding. All stages closely scheduled and done in a highly efficient manner. May not be the cheapest but AMJ Metal Roofing is an outstanding company to deal with (and I am not gaining anything by submitting this review). My wife was similarly impressed with the thorough cleanup when the job was finished.
Lynda Dunstan
2 years ago
Great company to deal with so nice to talk with happy people who actually enjoy their work. They were very easy to talk to about our job and we are very happy with their work thank you for your help A.M.J. Metal Roofing.
Leigh Cooper
3 years ago
Nobody *wants* a leaking roof. But if you do end up facing that stressful situation, get a quote from AMJ. They weren’t the cheapest but they were the most professional and only ones out of three that really thought through the problem and came up with a clever and workable solution for the shoddy roof design and build at our place.All their staff have been great to work with - always on time, polite, contactable. They made a stressful situation much better for us.I’m hoping not to have any problems with this roof for many years but if I need help with another roof, I’ll be calling AMJ!
Imelda Bordiss
a year ago
If you contract with AMJ Roofing you can be sure of a top quality finish using quality products. They recently replaced my 31yr old leaking tile roof with Colourbond and I could not be happier. The tradies were a lovely happy bunch of guys. I have a whole new house! When it rains I don’t have to go looking for the leaks.Alex was my supervisor and he was wonderful. Kept me informed all the way. In fact, I think the guttering guy let him down, so Alex put on his tool belt and got the job done.You can’t go wrong with AMJ Roofing. Info: I am on the Gold Coast. Photos: tiles to Colourbond
Jordan Miller
a year ago
Our experience with AMJ can be summed up in one word: exceptional!The team demonstrated absolute professionalism while tackling a very complicated re-roofing project on a busy medical building. Despite the challenges of limited access and working above a live, fully operational medical center on a bustling road, AMJ managed the entire project seamlessly.We received constant updates throughout, and the customer service provided by Shanelle was second to none. The finished product is flawless, and we wouldn’t hesitate to recommend AMJ for any roofing project.We look forward to working with them again!
Redcliffe Gardens
a year ago
We want to thank AMJ Roofing for their professionalism. Extremely happy with the outcome.A big thank you to Ryan the supervisor who consistently were communicating with us to make sure the job is done of highest standard.Thank you to Emily from AMJ office who updated us with everything.We will highly recommend AMJ to all our family and friendThank you AMJ Roofing
Linda Petersen
a year ago
Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen
Steven McKenna
8 months ago
A.M.J roofing replaced our old super 6 roofing with a colorbond roof in 2019. They did a fantastic job then, but when the cyclone hit this year (Feb 2025) we had a small leak into the bathroom ceiling.I contacted A.M.J about the problem and they were more than happy to come back do an inspection and organise a repair at no cost to us.In the end it turned out not to be the new roof installation that was the problem but an older section of roofing.I can't thank Cameron and everyone at A.M.J enough for the service, repair and follow up.
Jeanette Wren
8 months ago
AMJ were great from start to completion of our new roof. Office staff kept us informed throughout the process and the workmen were wonderful. Our roof looks great and the site was left clean and tidy. I would definitely recommend AMJ roofing.
Richard Hatcher
9 months ago
AMJ Metal Roofing just completed our roof and gutter replacement. We are extremely pleased with the results and throughly recommend the company. From the initial quotation right through to the site clean up, the AMJ team were extremely professional, keeping us fully informed every step and delivering on timelines.
James Braid
10 months ago
A.M.J made getting a new roof simple and enjoyable. Right from the beginning quote to the clean up! Always on time and keeping you fully informed of the process throughout. Very reasonable quote…. no need to look further. We are very happy to give this company 5 stars and would recommend to anybody.
Nathan Yates
4 months ago
For what is a big investment into your biggest asset. I can highly recommend AMJ. The whole team were wonderful to deal with from start to finish. I had them come back to fix something up for me and they were prompt and efficient. Every one I dealt with was great and would encourage anyone who is thinking about taking a leap of faith to give AMJ a go. So happy with the result but most importantly the peace of mind before, during and after knowing I was getting the job done right.
Walter Yeung
4 months ago
It has now been two months since our tiled roof was replaced with Colorbond, and we could not be happier with both the process and the result. The new roof looks stunning and has truly enhanced our home. From the initial quotation to the final completion, AMJ demonstrated exceptional professionalism, organization, and project management. Every member of the team was courteous, efficient, and highly skilled. We were especially impressed when, during a thunderstorm at 3am, someone from AMJ came to inspect our roof—an extraordinary level of care that exceeded our expectations. We are genuinely grateful for the outstanding service and are very pleased we chose AMJ for our roofing project.
John Cutler
4 months ago
I did a lot of research to find a company to replace my tile roof with colorbond. AMJ were professional from office contacts to roofing staff, and job was completely in a timely manner with no issues. Price was acceptable, completed roof work of a good standard.
Simone Leslie
3 months ago
We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

# TESTIMONIALS

[Get a Quote](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/contact/)

“AMJ Metal roofing has just completed the re-roofing of a commercial property for us, I do not comment on many things but as a retired plumber I could not fault the whole process, from the quotation, the communication and the quality of the finished product it was exceptional. What is quite amazing is with the systems that you have in place the whole job was done while the property was tenanted. As a previous business owner I must commend you on the team that you have and from my experience the attitudes all come from the top so congratulations on a great team.”

Noel ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“AMJ Metal Roofing replaced my leaking corrugated roof. Done in a few days with crane and scaffolding. All stages closely scheduled and done in a highly efficient manner. May not be the cheapest but AMJ Metal Roofing is an outstanding company to deal with (and I am not gaining anything by submitting this review). My wife was similarly impressed with the thorough cleanup when the job was finished.”

Robert ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Everyone in AMJ is a pleasure to deal with. We had dealt with AMJ a few times over the years from our initial roof installation to installing a flashing etc. From the ladies in the office to the guys who come out for the job are always courteous, friendly and reliable. Highly recommended!”

Yas ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Nobody \*wants\* a leaking roof. But if you do end up facing that stressful situation, get a quote from AMJ. They weren’t the cheapest but they were the most professional and only ones out of three that really thought through the problem and came up with a clever and workable solution for the shoddy roof design and build at our place.

All their staff have been great to work with – always on time, polite, contactable. They made a stressful situation much better for us.

I’m hoping not to have any problems with this roof for many years but if I need help with another roof, I’ll be calling AMJ!”

Leigh ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Having had a tile roof that leaked for years, I was keen to replace it with a tin roof when I retired. I got several quotes, one of which was from AMJ. AMJ were not the cheapest quote, but the cheaper quotes had a couple of “extra if needed” clauses in them and AMJ included it all in their price. AMJ were also by far the most professional to deal with at the time of getting quotes, they showed up when they said they would, they were very prompt with my questions and requests for variations to the quote as I wrapped my head around what I eventually wanted. All of their workers were very professional and courteous, they kept in contact with me continuously as things progressed and small changes had to be made due to weather and so on. They made sure all the work was complete, and were prompt to deal with a couple of small issues at the end before they sent me the final invoice. All in all it was a very pleasant experience to deal with this company, my stress levels were low throughout, I always new what was going on and what to expect. I would highly recommend doing business with this company.”

Jack ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“Appreciated the approachability of this company. Skilled workmanship. Honesty. Patience. Handled minor issues after completion with goodwill and righted them to my satisfaction.”

Kathryn ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

“I cannot recommend AMJ Metal Roofing enough. These guys removed our asbestos roof, replaced it with Colourbond and installed a fly-over roof over our rear deck. Nothing was an issue for these professionals. They were punctual, responsive and an absolute pleasure to deal with, thank you!”

The roof got tested with two big downpours - staff ready with buckets & sqeegees - we had no further leaks.3 works to describe AMJ? Efficient, competent, organized.You guys really know what youre doing...very well done!

[Sue Walker](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100243486162197016455/reviews)

9 years ago

AMJ was a great company to deal with. In 2011 I had the roof and guttering of my Sunnybank Hills property replaced by AMJ Metal Roofing. The new colour bond roof looked great and the job was completed with no disruption to our family and no rubbish left on site. The cost was very competitive. The roof withstood two severe hailstorms during the subsequent years with no damage or leaks.In 2017 I listed this property for sale and was required to supply a detailed independent building report which included an internal inspection of the roof. It was noted during this inspection that a small number of screws were not fixed properly into one of the batons. I rang AMJ Roofing and within 48 hours a company representative had come to the property, replaced the screws and provided certification for the work. I was very pleased with the service 6 years after the original job.

We couldn't be happier with the work that was done. All the tradies were wonderful and polite, they would let us know what was happening each day with the work and the time frame was great from start to finish the work took 4 days.I would recommend AMJ Metal roofing to everyone who needs a new roof or just maintenance. Very, very happy

[Linda Petersen](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/103023236311228026699/reviews)

a year ago

Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen

[Simone Leslie](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104076626391102626682/reviews)

3 months ago

We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

8 years ago
AMJ completed a roof replacement at our home. This involved removal of our old asbestos roof and replacing with a new colorbond roof, guttering and insulation. They also installed a new roof over our deck using insulated paneling.We were really happy with the end product and the care the AMJ team took in all their work. The team at AMJ kept us informed throughout the planning, the job was completed really quickly and I would recommend them to anyone.
Annavarium A
8 years ago
I was getting a Building and Pest inspection done on a house in Annerley I was looking at buying. Because of that storm cell that hit Annerley in 2014 I also had Dennis at A.M.J come out for a second opinion on the "tin" roof. The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, "No damage, the roof is good". Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo's later, he climb's back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I have contacted that company asking for a full refund! Again, thank you Dennis and A.M.J, very happy to recommend anyone to your company!! Cheers Mark @ Annerley
Tracey Gaske
9 years ago
AMJ Metal Roofing replaced our terracotta tile roof with a new colorbond roof. Their detailed quote gave peace of mind during the entire process. AMJ covered every detail involved in carrying out this project. 5 star service throughout the entire AMJ team. We love our new roof, thank you!
Marg Comino
9 years ago
These guys were very efficient with your paperwork & contract...great to deal with! We had had a number of people look at our (quite flat) roof over the years and your guys spent quite a while on the roof & said they knew what the problem was... The roof got tested with two big downpours - staff ready with buckets & sqeegees - we had no further leaks.3 works to describe AMJ? Efficient, competent, organized.You guys really know what youre doing...very well done!
Sue Walker
9 years ago
AMJ was a great company to deal with. In 2011 I had the roof and guttering of my Sunnybank Hills property replaced by AMJ Metal Roofing. The new colour bond roof looked great and the job was completed with no disruption to our family and no rubbish left on site. The cost was very competitive. The roof withstood two severe hailstorms during the subsequent years with no damage or leaks.In 2017 I listed this property for sale and was required to supply a detailed independent building report which included an internal inspection of the roof. It was noted during this inspection that a small number of screws were not fixed properly into one of the batons. I rang AMJ Roofing and within 48 hours a company representative had come to the property, replaced the screws and provided certification for the work. I was very pleased with the service 6 years after the original job.
Laura Ellis
9 years ago
Could not recommend AMJ Metal roofing more. Their company and staff were amazing to deal with. From the first initial contact to get a quote through to the completion of the roof has been so easy. From Jenna in the office who was easy to get in contact with and replied to emails and call very fast to Nigel who quoted, Matt who checked on the work process and all the tradies just made the entire process of replacing our old roof with a new metal roof so easy. We couldn't be happier with the work that was done. All the tradies were wonderful and polite, they would let us know what was happening each day with the work and the time frame was great from start to finish the work took 4 days.I would recommend AMJ Metal roofing to everyone who needs a new roof or just maintenance. Very, very happy
Jeremy Mackellar
9 years ago
Quality service, friendly professional staff, roof was completed on time with very neat finishing. Highly recommended
Matthew Savona
7 years ago
Thanks for our new roof!From the moment we first contacted AMJ, and right up until the roof was completed, we knew we had made the right decision to employ their services.Nigel provided us with an extremely thorough quote and offered us some helpful advice along the way. Nigel's quote actually involved him climbing onto the roof for a detailed inspection - unlike some quotes we received from others in the industry..Dennis then took the reigns and looked after us extremely well throughout the whole asbestos removal and subsequent roof installation process, and ensured that the finished product was exactly as had been quoted and was completed to a very high standard.Shanelle at their head office was always extremely thorough when assisting us with any queries we had and was always a pleasure to speak with. We are extremely happy with our new Zincalume roof. Not only does our home look fantastic, the internal house temperature during summer was significantly reduced once the new roof and insulation had been installed.Thank you to the team at AMJ for a job well done.Matt & JasMJ Renovations
Dirk Witteveen
7 years ago
We have had a very positive experience with AMJ. From the initial consultation with their sales person (Nigel), meeting one of the directors (Alan) to explain in detail their roofing solutions, dealing with their staff (James, Craig and others) through to their helpful administration staff (Shanelle) we have had exceptional service. Their pricing was very competitive and they delivered everything they said they would, on time and kept us well informed. I highly recommend them!Dirk Witteveen - Sheldon
Daniel Brennocks
7 years ago
Good job guys roof looks great would highly recommend these people to you good rates good work
P BERRY
7 years ago
We had to replace our deteriorated Cement Tiled roof and AMJ won the job after researching and comparing quotes from other companies. We are thrilled with the results of our new Colourbond metal roof. Nigel quoted and answered all questions we had, Shanelle was just as helpful from the Office, Dennis and the Team were punctual, friendly, very professional and left our yard tidy. The roof was on in 2 days with zero interruption to familly life. Dennis even saved us future heartache and expense when removing the existing solar hot water tank. It was too dodgy to put back up and he co-ordinated with the Plumber for installation of a new system. I was kept up to date with photos and text messages and phone calls before, during and after the job. We rate AMJ Roofing 10 out of 10 and would highly recommend the Team to anyone requiring a roofing specialist.
Thomas Burne
7 years ago
Excellent from start to finish. Nigel organised the quote and was very professional and the quote was competitive. Dennis coordinated the work from delivery, managing the site and clean up. Good communication, no fuss and very responsive to questions. Very happy with our full roof replacement on a 1926 Queenslander.
Steve Mendelle
7 years ago
Cameron was totally professional and competent. He advised us well. The speed with which the job was finished - a complete roof renewal - was just amazing. The work was done thoroughly, all rubbish was taken away speedily and the Manor red colorbond roof looks just like the advert; I stand and stare in amazement at the beauty of this new roof. I throughly recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.
Simon Cook
7 years ago
Thank you so much to the AMJ Team for our new roof!It was a great experience from meeting Nigel for the quote, talking with the team in the office and having our foreman Denis overseeing the job at every stage was seemless and professional. The team went to every length to ensure we were 100% happy with the job.We would throughly recommend AMJ to anyone wanting to transform their home or business.Thanks again, Simon and Emma.
Michael Brill
7 years ago
AMJ did a great job replacing my roof, from competitive pricing to the quality and speed of their work. Thank you!
Andrew Brown
7 years ago
AMJ did a fantastic job on quite a complicated job.Were happy to be heavily involved in the planning and provided a quality result on time.Would definitely recommend and would definitely use again.
John Clark
7 years ago
Very happy with our new colourbond roof. Thanks Graeme & the team.
Andrea Savas
6 years ago
We only had our gutters replaced so our job was not as big as some that AMJ do but we were still treated the same as if we were having our whole roof replaced. they did a great job and Shanelle in the office is an absolute treasusre to deal with. Would highly recommend.
Kennedy Rayani
6 years ago
They couldn't come too busy with the recent rains.Communication was good sent me email to let me know
Billie Jacinta
6 years ago
I am across road from building done in Kedron and am very impressed with the work prompt timing and very professional and thorough Well done guys
Erica Cockburn
5 years ago
We are very happy with the roof replacement performed by AMJ on our colonial style home. The tradesmen were a very talented, efficient and friendly group who worked together like a well oiled machine. Their supervisor Graham did a great job keeping us informed and updated and the job ran smoothly. We would not hesitate to recommend them to any one looking for metal roofers.
Robert Lester
2 years ago
AMJ Metal Roofing replaced my leaking corrugated roof. Done in a few days with crane and scaffolding. All stages closely scheduled and done in a highly efficient manner. May not be the cheapest but AMJ Metal Roofing is an outstanding company to deal with (and I am not gaining anything by submitting this review). My wife was similarly impressed with the thorough cleanup when the job was finished.
Lynda Dunstan
2 years ago
Great company to deal with so nice to talk with happy people who actually enjoy their work. They were very easy to talk to about our job and we are very happy with their work thank you for your help A.M.J. Metal Roofing.
Leigh Cooper
3 years ago
Nobody *wants* a leaking roof. But if you do end up facing that stressful situation, get a quote from AMJ. They weren’t the cheapest but they were the most professional and only ones out of three that really thought through the problem and came up with a clever and workable solution for the shoddy roof design and build at our place.All their staff have been great to work with - always on time, polite, contactable. They made a stressful situation much better for us.I’m hoping not to have any problems with this roof for many years but if I need help with another roof, I’ll be calling AMJ!
Imelda Bordiss
a year ago
If you contract with AMJ Roofing you can be sure of a top quality finish using quality products. They recently replaced my 31yr old leaking tile roof with Colourbond and I could not be happier. The tradies were a lovely happy bunch of guys. I have a whole new house! When it rains I don’t have to go looking for the leaks.Alex was my supervisor and he was wonderful. Kept me informed all the way. In fact, I think the guttering guy let him down, so Alex put on his tool belt and got the job done.You can’t go wrong with AMJ Roofing. Info: I am on the Gold Coast. Photos: tiles to Colourbond
Jordan Miller
a year ago
Our experience with AMJ can be summed up in one word: exceptional!The team demonstrated absolute professionalism while tackling a very complicated re-roofing project on a busy medical building. Despite the challenges of limited access and working above a live, fully operational medical center on a bustling road, AMJ managed the entire project seamlessly.We received constant updates throughout, and the customer service provided by Shanelle was second to none. The finished product is flawless, and we wouldn’t hesitate to recommend AMJ for any roofing project.We look forward to working with them again!
Redcliffe Gardens
a year ago
We want to thank AMJ Roofing for their professionalism. Extremely happy with the outcome.A big thank you to Ryan the supervisor who consistently were communicating with us to make sure the job is done of highest standard.Thank you to Emily from AMJ office who updated us with everything.We will highly recommend AMJ to all our family and friendThank you AMJ Roofing
Linda Petersen
a year ago
Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen
Steven McKenna
8 months ago
A.M.J roofing replaced our old super 6 roofing with a colorbond roof in 2019. They did a fantastic job then, but when the cyclone hit this year (Feb 2025) we had a small leak into the bathroom ceiling.I contacted A.M.J about the problem and they were more than happy to come back do an inspection and organise a repair at no cost to us.In the end it turned out not to be the new roof installation that was the problem but an older section of roofing.I can't thank Cameron and everyone at A.M.J enough for the service, repair and follow up.
Jeanette Wren
8 months ago
AMJ were great from start to completion of our new roof. Office staff kept us informed throughout the process and the workmen were wonderful. Our roof looks great and the site was left clean and tidy. I would definitely recommend AMJ roofing.
Richard Hatcher
9 months ago
AMJ Metal Roofing just completed our roof and gutter replacement. We are extremely pleased with the results and throughly recommend the company. From the initial quotation right through to the site clean up, the AMJ team were extremely professional, keeping us fully informed every step and delivering on timelines.
James Braid
10 months ago
A.M.J made getting a new roof simple and enjoyable. Right from the beginning quote to the clean up! Always on time and keeping you fully informed of the process throughout. Very reasonable quote…. no need to look further. We are very happy to give this company 5 stars and would recommend to anybody.
Nathan Yates
4 months ago
For what is a big investment into your biggest asset. I can highly recommend AMJ. The whole team were wonderful to deal with from start to finish. I had them come back to fix something up for me and they were prompt and efficient. Every one I dealt with was great and would encourage anyone who is thinking about taking a leap of faith to give AMJ a go. So happy with the result but most importantly the peace of mind before, during and after knowing I was getting the job done right.
Walter Yeung
4 months ago
It has now been two months since our tiled roof was replaced with Colorbond, and we could not be happier with both the process and the result. The new roof looks stunning and has truly enhanced our home. From the initial quotation to the final completion, AMJ demonstrated exceptional professionalism, organization, and project management. Every member of the team was courteous, efficient, and highly skilled. We were especially impressed when, during a thunderstorm at 3am, someone from AMJ came to inspect our roof—an extraordinary level of care that exceeded our expectations. We are genuinely grateful for the outstanding service and are very pleased we chose AMJ for our roofing project.
John Cutler
4 months ago
I did a lot of research to find a company to replace my tile roof with colorbond. AMJ were professional from office contacts to roofing staff, and job was completely in a timely manner with no issues. Price was acceptable, completed roof work of a good standard.
Simone Leslie
3 months ago
We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

HELPFUL
ARTICLES

Get a Quote

Looking for Roof Repairs in North Brisbane? Use A.M.J Metal Roofing Pty Ltd to Get a Colorbond Roof, serving Brisbane Northside and Southside

When your roof is damaged by a bad storm or another natural event, it can be a major source of stress. After all, a roof that is structurally unsound, leaky, or just in need of major overall repairs is a risk that no one wants to deal with.

At A.M.J Metal Roofing, we understand the need for repairing roofs promptly. Not only do we feature a short lead time you can rely upon, but we will install an excellent and durable Colorbond roof on your North Brisbane home. These roofs are less expensive, safer in severe weather, lighter weight, and more resistant to weathering than traditional roofing materials. Not only that, but they feature many colours, so you can customise the look of your home easily when you replace the roof. At A.M.J, we pride ourselves on delivering to customers a superior experience. With decades of combined industry experience and a focus on safety, we are a great choice for roof replacements and repairs throughout Queensland.

A Superior Source for a Colorbond Roof in North Brisbane

What makes A.M.J Metal Roofing the company that you should trust with your new roof? Aside from our great track record of giving homes a great Colorbond roof in Brisbane Northside, we place a great emphasis on customer satisfaction. As Brisbane’s roofing specialists, we prioritise making sure our clients are happy with their finished product. From the moment you get in touch with us to start the process of replacing your roof with a Colorbond roof, we spring into action. That’s how we are able to accomplish a consistently short lead time. We are able and equipped to work on just about any kind of roof your building has.

Does your home feature a tile roof currently? No problem! We can replace it with Colorbond without issues. We also handle replacement of asbestos roofing (though take note that this is the only asbestos removal we complete) with a superior product. We are a member of numerous building organisations, and we are fully licensed and insured. You can trust A.M.J to handle your roofing job with the care and precision your home needs. We can even work with your insurance company to assist in completing the repair of storm damage.

No-Obligation Free Quotes and Competitive Pricing

When you want to get a new Colorbond roof in Brisbane Southside, A.M.J Metal Roofing hopes you will consider our services. We offer free quotes completely free of any obligation. We believe that once you see the value of our service and our industry competitive pricing, the choice will be clear. If you want to get a quote or you have questions about our service, we stand ready to answer your enquiries. Give us a call today on (07) 3823 2773 or 1300 12 7663, or use our quote form on our website. We look forward to working with you to give your home a beautifully repaired roof.

REQUEST A QUOTE

Call us on 1300 12 ROOF or fill out the form below to get you
one step closer to your custom designed outdoor roof

We’d love to work with you
