Notifications

A.M.J Metal Roofing Brisbane
4.8
Mitchell Watson
8 years ago
AMJ completed a roof replacement at our home. This involved removal of our old asbestos roof and replacing with a new colorbond roof, guttering and insulation. They also installed a new roof over our deck using insulated paneling.We were really happy with the end product and the care the AMJ team took in all their work. The team at AMJ kept us informed throughout the planning, the job was completed really quickly and I would recommend them to anyone.
Annavarium A
8 years ago
I was getting a Building and Pest inspection done on a house in Annerley I was looking at buying. Because of that storm cell that hit Annerley in 2014 I also had Dennis at A.M.J come out for a second opinion on the "tin" roof. The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, "No damage, the roof is good". Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo's later, he climb's back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I have contacted that company asking for a full refund! Again, thank you Dennis and A.M.J, very happy to recommend anyone to your company!! Cheers Mark @ Annerley
Tracey Gaske
9 years ago
AMJ Metal Roofing replaced our terracotta tile roof with a new colorbond roof. Their detailed quote gave peace of mind during the entire process. AMJ covered every detail involved in carrying out this project. 5 star service throughout the entire AMJ team. We love our new roof, thank you!
Marg Comino
9 years ago
These guys were very efficient with your paperwork & contract...great to deal with! We had had a number of people look at our (quite flat) roof over the years and your guys spent quite a while on the roof & said they knew what the problem was... The roof got tested with two big downpours - staff ready with buckets & sqeegees - we had no further leaks.3 works to describe AMJ? Efficient, competent, organized.You guys really know what youre doing...very well done!
Sue Walker
9 years ago
AMJ was a great company to deal with. In 2011 I had the roof and guttering of my Sunnybank Hills property replaced by AMJ Metal Roofing. The new colour bond roof looked great and the job was completed with no disruption to our family and no rubbish left on site. The cost was very competitive. The roof withstood two severe hailstorms during the subsequent years with no damage or leaks.In 2017 I listed this property for sale and was required to supply a detailed independent building report which included an internal inspection of the roof. It was noted during this inspection that a small number of screws were not fixed properly into one of the batons. I rang AMJ Roofing and within 48 hours a company representative had come to the property, replaced the screws and provided certification for the work. I was very pleased with the service 6 years after the original job.
Laura Ellis
9 years ago
Could not recommend AMJ Metal roofing more. Their company and staff were amazing to deal with. From the first initial contact to get a quote through to the completion of the roof has been so easy. From Jenna in the office who was easy to get in contact with and replied to emails and call very fast to Nigel who quoted, Matt who checked on the work process and all the tradies just made the entire process of replacing our old roof with a new metal roof so easy. We couldn't be happier with the work that was done. All the tradies were wonderful and polite, they would let us know what was happening each day with the work and the time frame was great from start to finish the work took 4 days.I would recommend AMJ Metal roofing to everyone who needs a new roof or just maintenance. Very, very happy
Jeremy Mackellar
9 years ago
Quality service, friendly professional staff, roof was completed on time with very neat finishing. Highly recommended
Matthew Savona
7 years ago
Thanks for our new roof!From the moment we first contacted AMJ, and right up until the roof was completed, we knew we had made the right decision to employ their services.Nigel provided us with an extremely thorough quote and offered us some helpful advice along the way. Nigel's quote actually involved him climbing onto the roof for a detailed inspection - unlike some quotes we received from others in the industry..Dennis then took the reigns and looked after us extremely well throughout the whole asbestos removal and subsequent roof installation process, and ensured that the finished product was exactly as had been quoted and was completed to a very high standard.Shanelle at their head office was always extremely thorough when assisting us with any queries we had and was always a pleasure to speak with. We are extremely happy with our new Zincalume roof. Not only does our home look fantastic, the internal house temperature during summer was significantly reduced once the new roof and insulation had been installed.Thank you to the team at AMJ for a job well done.Matt & JasMJ Renovations
Dirk Witteveen
7 years ago
We have had a very positive experience with AMJ. From the initial consultation with their sales person (Nigel), meeting one of the directors (Alan) to explain in detail their roofing solutions, dealing with their staff (James, Craig and others) through to their helpful administration staff (Shanelle) we have had exceptional service. Their pricing was very competitive and they delivered everything they said they would, on time and kept us well informed. I highly recommend them!Dirk Witteveen - Sheldon
Daniel Brennocks
7 years ago
Good job guys roof looks great would highly recommend these people to you good rates good work
P BERRY
7 years ago
We had to replace our deteriorated Cement Tiled roof and AMJ won the job after researching and comparing quotes from other companies. We are thrilled with the results of our new Colourbond metal roof. Nigel quoted and answered all questions we had, Shanelle was just as helpful from the Office, Dennis and the Team were punctual, friendly, very professional and left our yard tidy. The roof was on in 2 days with zero interruption to familly life. Dennis even saved us future heartache and expense when removing the existing solar hot water tank. It was too dodgy to put back up and he co-ordinated with the Plumber for installation of a new system. I was kept up to date with photos and text messages and phone calls before, during and after the job. We rate AMJ Roofing 10 out of 10 and would highly recommend the Team to anyone requiring a roofing specialist.
Thomas Burne
7 years ago
Excellent from start to finish. Nigel organised the quote and was very professional and the quote was competitive. Dennis coordinated the work from delivery, managing the site and clean up. Good communication, no fuss and very responsive to questions. Very happy with our full roof replacement on a 1926 Queenslander.
Steve Mendelle
7 years ago
Cameron was totally professional and competent. He advised us well. The speed with which the job was finished - a complete roof renewal - was just amazing. The work was done thoroughly, all rubbish was taken away speedily and the Manor red colorbond roof looks just like the advert; I stand and stare in amazement at the beauty of this new roof. I throughly recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.
Simon Cook
7 years ago
Thank you so much to the AMJ Team for our new roof!It was a great experience from meeting Nigel for the quote, talking with the team in the office and having our foreman Denis overseeing the job at every stage was seemless and professional. The team went to every length to ensure we were 100% happy with the job.We would throughly recommend AMJ to anyone wanting to transform their home or business.Thanks again, Simon and Emma.
Michael Brill
7 years ago
AMJ did a great job replacing my roof, from competitive pricing to the quality and speed of their work. Thank you!
Andrew Brown
7 years ago
AMJ did a fantastic job on quite a complicated job.Were happy to be heavily involved in the planning and provided a quality result on time.Would definitely recommend and would definitely use again.
John Clark
7 years ago
Very happy with our new colourbond roof. Thanks Graeme & the team.
Andrea Savas
6 years ago
We only had our gutters replaced so our job was not as big as some that AMJ do but we were still treated the same as if we were having our whole roof replaced. they did a great job and Shanelle in the office is an absolute treasusre to deal with. Would highly recommend.
Kennedy Rayani
6 years ago
They couldn't come too busy with the recent rains.Communication was good sent me email to let me know
Billie Jacinta
6 years ago
I am across road from building done in Kedron and am very impressed with the work prompt timing and very professional and thorough Well done guys
Erica Cockburn
5 years ago
We are very happy with the roof replacement performed by AMJ on our colonial style home. The tradesmen were a very talented, efficient and friendly group who worked together like a well oiled machine. Their supervisor Graham did a great job keeping us informed and updated and the job ran smoothly. We would not hesitate to recommend them to any one looking for metal roofers.
Robert Lester
2 years ago
AMJ Metal Roofing replaced my leaking corrugated roof. Done in a few days with crane and scaffolding. All stages closely scheduled and done in a highly efficient manner. May not be the cheapest but AMJ Metal Roofing is an outstanding company to deal with (and I am not gaining anything by submitting this review). My wife was similarly impressed with the thorough cleanup when the job was finished.
Lynda Dunstan
2 years ago
Great company to deal with so nice to talk with happy people who actually enjoy their work. They were very easy to talk to about our job and we are very happy with their work thank you for your help A.M.J. Metal Roofing.
Leigh Cooper
3 years ago
Nobody *wants* a leaking roof. But if you do end up facing that stressful situation, get a quote from AMJ. They weren’t the cheapest but they were the most professional and only ones out of three that really thought through the problem and came up with a clever and workable solution for the shoddy roof design and build at our place.All their staff have been great to work with - always on time, polite, contactable. They made a stressful situation much better for us.I’m hoping not to have any problems with this roof for many years but if I need help with another roof, I’ll be calling AMJ!
Imelda Bordiss
a year ago
If you contract with AMJ Roofing you can be sure of a top quality finish using quality products. They recently replaced my 31yr old leaking tile roof with Colourbond and I could not be happier. The tradies were a lovely happy bunch of guys. I have a whole new house! When it rains I don’t have to go looking for the leaks.Alex was my supervisor and he was wonderful. Kept me informed all the way. In fact, I think the guttering guy let him down, so Alex put on his tool belt and got the job done.You can’t go wrong with AMJ Roofing. Info: I am on the Gold Coast. Photos: tiles to Colourbond
Jordan Miller
a year ago
Our experience with AMJ can be summed up in one word: exceptional!The team demonstrated absolute professionalism while tackling a very complicated re-roofing project on a busy medical building. Despite the challenges of limited access and working above a live, fully operational medical center on a bustling road, AMJ managed the entire project seamlessly.We received constant updates throughout, and the customer service provided by Shanelle was second to none. The finished product is flawless, and we wouldn’t hesitate to recommend AMJ for any roofing project.We look forward to working with them again!
Redcliffe Gardens
a year ago
We want to thank AMJ Roofing for their professionalism. Extremely happy with the outcome.A big thank you to Ryan the supervisor who consistently were communicating with us to make sure the job is done of highest standard.Thank you to Emily from AMJ office who updated us with everything.We will highly recommend AMJ to all our family and friendThank you AMJ Roofing
Linda Petersen
a year ago
Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen
Steven McKenna
8 months ago
A.M.J roofing replaced our old super 6 roofing with a colorbond roof in 2019. They did a fantastic job then, but when the cyclone hit this year (Feb 2025) we had a small leak into the bathroom ceiling.I contacted A.M.J about the problem and they were more than happy to come back do an inspection and organise a repair at no cost to us.In the end it turned out not to be the new roof installation that was the problem but an older section of roofing.I can't thank Cameron and everyone at A.M.J enough for the service, repair and follow up.
Jeanette Wren
8 months ago
AMJ were great from start to completion of our new roof. Office staff kept us informed throughout the process and the workmen were wonderful. Our roof looks great and the site was left clean and tidy. I would definitely recommend AMJ roofing.
Richard Hatcher
9 months ago
AMJ Metal Roofing just completed our roof and gutter replacement. We are extremely pleased with the results and throughly recommend the company. From the initial quotation right through to the site clean up, the AMJ team were extremely professional, keeping us fully informed every step and delivering on timelines.
James Braid
10 months ago
A.M.J made getting a new roof simple and enjoyable. Right from the beginning quote to the clean up! Always on time and keeping you fully informed of the process throughout. Very reasonable quote…. no need to look further. We are very happy to give this company 5 stars and would recommend to anybody.
Nathan Yates
4 months ago
For what is a big investment into your biggest asset. I can highly recommend AMJ. The whole team were wonderful to deal with from start to finish. I had them come back to fix something up for me and they were prompt and efficient. Every one I dealt with was great and would encourage anyone who is thinking about taking a leap of faith to give AMJ a go. So happy with the result but most importantly the peace of mind before, during and after knowing I was getting the job done right.
Walter Yeung
4 months ago
It has now been two months since our tiled roof was replaced with Colorbond, and we could not be happier with both the process and the result. The new roof looks stunning and has truly enhanced our home. From the initial quotation to the final completion, AMJ demonstrated exceptional professionalism, organization, and project management. Every member of the team was courteous, efficient, and highly skilled. We were especially impressed when, during a thunderstorm at 3am, someone from AMJ came to inspect our roof—an extraordinary level of care that exceeded our expectations. We are genuinely grateful for the outstanding service and are very pleased we chose AMJ for our roofing project.
John Cutler
4 months ago
I did a lot of research to find a company to replace my tile roof with colorbond. AMJ were professional from office contacts to roofing staff, and job was completely in a timely manner with no issues. Price was acceptable, completed roof work of a good standard.
Simone Leslie
3 months ago
We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

## Looking for Roof Repairs in North Brisbane? Use A.M.J Metal Roofing Pty Ltd to Get a Colorbond Roof, serving Brisbane Northside and Southside

When your roof is damaged by a bad storm or another natural event, it can be a major source of stress. After all, a roof that is structurally unsound, leaky, or just in need of major overall repairs is a risk that no one wants to deal with.

At A.M.J Metal Roofing, we understand the need for repairing roofs promptly. Not only do we feature a short lead time you can rely upon, but we will install an excellent and durable Colorbond roof on your North Brisbane home. These roofs are less expensive, safer in severe weather, lighter weight, and more resistant to weathering than traditional roofing materials. Not only that, but they feature many colours, so you can customise the look of your home easily when you replace the roof. At A.M.J, we pride ourselves on delivering to customers a superior experience. With decades of combined industry experience and a focus on safety, we are a great choice for roof replacements and repairs throughout Queensland.

A Superior Source for a Colorbond Roof in North Brisbane

What makes A.M.J Metal Roofing the company that you should trust with your new roof? Aside from our great track record of giving homes a great Colorbond roof in Brisbane Northside, we place a great emphasis on customer satisfaction. As Brisbane’s roofing specialists, we prioritise making sure our clients are happy with their finished product. From the moment you get in touch with us to start the process of replacing your roof with a Colorbond roof, we spring into action. That’s how we are able to accomplish a consistently short lead time. We are able and equipped to work on just about any kind of roof your building has.

Does your home feature a tile roof currently? No problem! We can replace it with Colorbond without issues. We also handle replacement of asbestos roofing (though take note that this is the only asbestos removal we complete) with a superior product. We are a member of numerous building organisations, and we are fully licensed and insured. You can trust A.M.J to handle your roofing job with the care and precision your home needs. We can even work with your insurance company to assist in completing the repair of storm damage.

No-Obligation Free Quotes and Competitive Pricing

When you want to get a new Colorbond roof in Brisbane Southside, A.M.J Metal Roofing hopes you will consider our services. We offer free quotes completely free of any obligation. We believe that once you see the value of our service and our industry competitive pricing, the choice will be clear. If you want to get a quote or you have questions about our service, we stand ready to answer your enquiries. Give us a call today on (07) 3823 2773 or 1300 12 7663, or use our quote form on our website. We look forward to working with you to give your home a beautifully repaired roof.

Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

HELPFUL
ARTICLES

Get a Quote

For Superior Colorbond Roofing North of Brisbane, as well as Brisbane Northside and Southside, Rely Upon A.M.J Metal Roofing Pty Ltd

Your roof is one of the most important parts of your home. Not only does it provide you with the shelter your home is for, but it can also function as the defining aesthetic element of the building. If you are no longer satisfied with the way your roof looks, either because it has become old and out-dated, or you are just ready for a change, A.M.J. Metal Roofing Pty Ltd is ready to help you. We provide Colorbond roofing to North Brisbane, and it can transform the look of your home.

What is Colorbond roofing? Created by BlueScope Steel, Colorbond is an extremely durable steel roofing material made with a baked-on paint finish that is resistant to all major kinds of weathering, including peeling and chipping. With 22 colours meant to match well with the varied Australian landscape, it is easy for you to find the colour that will make your home look brand new again. When it’s time to replace your roof, turn to us for a job done well.

A.M.J Metal Roofing Replaces Your Brisbane Home’s Old Roof with Durable Colorbond

What exactly is it that makes Colorbond roofing the right choice for Brisbane Northside homes? The benefits of this great material are many. We’ve already mentioned the weather resistant finish and the diverse range of colours, of course, but there is more to Colorbond than that.

This long-lasting steel is a lightweight material, which puts less stress on your house’s internal structure, extending its lifespan. It resists the harsh rays of the Australian sun, and in bad weather, it will not create dangerous flying debris like a tile roof can. BlueScope has created a very sturdy material that has under-gone extensive and rigorous testing, to ensure that it can absolutely stand up to anything the Australian elements can throw at it. Colorbond roofing in Brisbane is not only a beautiful way to alter the way your home looks, but its practicality is virtually unmatched by any other roofing material.

Trust in Our Experience and Enjoy Our Safe, Friendly Service

So what sets A.M.J apart in terms of supplying Colorbond roofing to the Brisbane Southside? For starters, our prices are very competitive in an industry that isn’t often focused on value for the customer. We offer a 10-year warranty on our workmanship, and BlueScope Steel backs its Colorbond roofing with a 25-year warranty as well, affording you years of peace of mind.

When it comes to getting the job done, we are quick and efficient, with a consistently small lead time. Not only that, but we have a commitment to getting the job done safely, too. With our own in-house Safety Officer, we perform every job to exacting safety standards as we follow all relevant legislation. We place a high value on the safety of our clients and our workers.

Ready to get a quote from us? It’s free, and free of obligation, too! Explore our website further to use our free quote form. You can also reach us by calling us on (07) 3823 2773 or 1300 12 7663. We look forward to hearing from you and assisting you with picking out great new Colorbond roofing.

REQUEST A QUOTE

Call us on 1300 12 ROOF or fill out the form below to get you
one step closer to your custom designed outdoor roof

Linda Petersen
Steven McKenna
8 months ago
A.M.J roofing replaced our old super 6 roofing with a colorbond roof in 2019. They did a fantastic job then, but when the cyclone hit this year (Feb 2025) we had a small leak into the bathroom ceiling.I contacted A.M.J about the problem and they were more than happy to come back do an inspection and organise a repair at no cost to us.In the end it turned out not to be the new roof installation that was the problem but an older section of roofing.I can't thank Cameron and everyone at A.M.J enough for the service, repair and follow up.
Jeanette Wren
8 months ago
AMJ were great from start to completion of our new roof. Office staff kept us informed throughout the process and the workmen were wonderful. Our roof looks great and the site was left clean and tidy. I would definitely recommend AMJ roofing.
Richard Hatcher
9 months ago
AMJ Metal Roofing just completed our roof and gutter replacement. We are extremely pleased with the results and throughly recommend the company. From the initial quotation right through to the site clean up, the AMJ team were extremely professional, keeping us fully informed every step and delivering on timelines.
James Braid
10 months ago
A.M.J made getting a new roof simple and enjoyable. Right from the beginning quote to the clean up! Always on time and keeping you fully informed of the process throughout. Very reasonable quote…. no need to look further. We are very happy to give this company 5 stars and would recommend to anybody.
Nathan Yates
4 months ago
For what is a big investment into your biggest asset. I can highly recommend AMJ. The whole team were wonderful to deal with from start to finish. I had them come back to fix something up for me and they were prompt and efficient. Every one I dealt with was great and would encourage anyone who is thinking about taking a leap of faith to give AMJ a go. So happy with the result but most importantly the peace of mind before, during and after knowing I was getting the job done right.
Walter Yeung
4 months ago
It has now been two months since our tiled roof was replaced with Colorbond, and we could not be happier with both the process and the result. The new roof looks stunning and has truly enhanced our home. From the initial quotation to the final completion, AMJ demonstrated exceptional professionalism, organization, and project management. Every member of the team was courteous, efficient, and highly skilled. We were especially impressed when, during a thunderstorm at 3am, someone from AMJ came to inspect our roof—an extraordinary level of care that exceeded our expectations. We are genuinely grateful for the outstanding service and are very pleased we chose AMJ for our roofing project.
John Cutler
4 months ago
I did a lot of research to find a company to replace my tile roof with colorbond. AMJ were professional from office contacts to roofing staff, and job was completely in a timely manner with no issues. Price was acceptable, completed roof work of a good standard.
Simone Leslie
3 months ago
We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

# **HELPFUL**   ARTICLES

[Get a Quote](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/contact/)

## For Superior Colorbond Roofing North of Brisbane, as well as Brisbane Northside and Southside, Rely Upon A.M.J Metal Roofing Pty Ltd

Your roof is one of the most important parts of your home. Not only does it provide you with the shelter your home is for, but it can also function as the defining aesthetic element of the building. If you are no longer satisfied with the way your roof looks, either because it has become old and out-dated, or you are just ready for a change, A.M.J. Metal Roofing Pty Ltd is ready to help you. We provide Colorbond roofing to North Brisbane, and it can transform the look of your home.

What is Colorbond roofing? Created by BlueScope Steel, Colorbond is an extremely durable steel roofing material made with a baked-on paint finish that is resistant to all major kinds of weathering, including peeling and chipping. With 22 colours meant to match well with the varied Australian landscape, it is easy for you to find the colour that will make your home look brand new again. When it’s time to replace your roof, turn to us for a job done well.

A.M.J Metal Roofing Replaces Your Brisbane Home’s Old Roof with Durable Colorbond

What exactly is it that makes Colorbond roofing the right choice for Brisbane Northside homes? The benefits of this great material are many. We’ve already mentioned the weather resistant finish and the diverse range of colours, of course, but there is more to Colorbond than that.

This long-lasting steel is a lightweight material, which puts less stress on your house’s internal structure, extending its lifespan. It resists the harsh rays of the Australian sun, and in bad weather, it will not create dangerous flying debris like a tile roof can. BlueScope has created a very sturdy material that has under-gone extensive and rigorous testing, to ensure that it can absolutely stand up to anything the Australian elements can throw at it. Colorbond roofing in Brisbane is not only a beautiful way to alter the way your home looks, but its practicality is virtually unmatched by any other roofing material.

Trust in Our Experience and Enjoy Our Safe, Friendly Service

So what sets A.M.J apart in terms of supplying Colorbond roofing to the Brisbane Southside? For starters, our prices are very competitive in an industry that isn’t often focused on value for the customer. We offer a 10-year warranty on our workmanship, and BlueScope Steel backs its Colorbond roofing with a 25-year warranty as well, affording you years of peace of mind.

When it comes to getting the job done, we are quick and efficient, with a consistently small lead time. Not only that, but we have a commitment to getting the job done safely, too. With our own in-house Safety Officer, we perform every job to exacting safety standards as we follow all relevant legislation. We place a high value on the safety of our clients and our workers.

Ready to get a quote from us? It’s free, and free of obligation, too! Explore our website further to use our free quote form. You can also reach us by calling us on (07) 3823 2773 or 1300 12 7663. We look forward to hearing from you and assisting you with picking out great new Colorbond roofing.

I was getting a Building and Pest inspection done on a house in Annerley I was looking at buying. Because of that storm cell that hit Annerley in 2014 I also had Dennis at A.M.J come out for a second opinion on the "tin" roof. The Building and Pest guys gave the roof the all clear, "No damage, the roof is good". Dennis actually got out the ladder, climbed up the side of the high-set Queenslander and properly inspected the roof. Two minutes, and a half dozen photo's later, he climb's back down to tell me the roof has been severely damaged by hail, and will have to be replaced. Without a proper quote, anywhere up to $30 000. Well, thank you Dennis! That would have been a very expensive mistake you helped me avoid if I had just taken the word of a very reputable, local Building and Pest company. I have contacted that company asking for a full refund! Again, thank you Dennis and A.M.J, very happy to recommend anyone to your company!! Cheers Mark @ Annerley

3 months ago

We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

## Receive Asbestos Roof Replacement in Northside and Southside Brisbane with A.M.J Metal Roofing

Most of us are aware that asbestos is a major health concern, but there are many other reasons to receive asbestos roof replacements in Brisbane, Northside or Southside. If you have asbestos, it could prevent you from selling your home [_…read more_](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/asbestos-roof-replacement-brisbane-north-northside-southside/).

## Looking for Roof Repairs in North Brisbane? Use A.M.J Metal Roofing Pty Ltd to Get a Colorbond Roof, serving Brisbane Northside and Southside

We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

Colorbond
Cladding Installation

Get a Quote

What Colorbond Wall Cladding Can Add to Your Home (And Who to Call for Colorbond Installations in Gold Coast)

While our brand name is A.M.J Metal Roofing, we also do our fair share of metal wall cladding. Using materials from Colorbond, we can create stunning exterior facades or interior accent walls for your home or business. Colorbond cladding is steel, reinforced with a metallic coating, a treatment, a primer coat of paint, and a coloured top coat of paint. The result is strong, robust metal cladding in unique and striking colours.

Why Choose Colorbond Cladding for Your Gold Coast Home or Office?

So what are the benefits of hiring A.M.J Metal Roofing for a Colorbond cladding installation service in Gold Coast? There are many advantages to using Colorbond, both aesthetic, and practical.

Here are some of the ones that we hear our customers praising most frequently:

  • Colorbond cladding is available in a versatile array of colours: One of the top reasons that our customers in Gold Coast love Colorbond cladding is how it opens up the options they have for the look of their home. Colorbond cladding comes in 22 different colours, which is more than what is usually available for building materials. Homeowners who want an unusual colour for the exterior of their homes can achieve the look they want with Colorbond cladding. Similarly, businesses that want to match their front façade to the colours of their brand logo have more options thanks to Colorbond.
  • The texture is unique: For exterior purposes, Colorbond cladding might be most desirable due to colour. For interior feature walls, you could achieve the same colour versatility with paint. However, what Colorbond offers that paint can’t is texture. The unique texture of Colorbond cladding can spice up the architecture of a Gold Coast home and give it more character and personality. It looks particularly great in modern style homes.
  • Colorbond acts like a suit of armour for your home: Perhaps the most significant benefit of Colorbond wall cladding is how it can protect your home (or business) from elemental threats. Despite being extremely lightweight, Colorbond is very durable, capable of withstanding heavy winds, snow, rain or even hail without denting or chipping. It can also withstand heavy sun exposure, with the exterior topcoat of paint resistant to blistering and flaking. These qualities allow Colorbond to act like a suit of armour around your home, keeping out high heat, piercing cold, moisture from the rain and more. Over time, this extra layer of defence can lower your home’s heating and cooling costs, protect from leaks or water damage and reduce overall maintenance needs.
Schedule Your Gold Coast Colorbond Cladding Installation Today

Are you interested in learning more about Colorbond wall cladding? Do you want to schedule a Colorbond installation in the Gold Coast area?

Either way, A.M.J Metal Roofing can help. You can give us a call on (07) 3823 2773 or 1300 12 7663 to share your enquiry with our sales team.

REQUEST A QUOTE

Call us on 1300 12 ROOF or fill out the form below to get you
one step closer to your free quote.

Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen
Steven McKenna
8 months ago
A.M.J roofing replaced our old super 6 roofing with a colorbond roof in 2019. They did a fantastic job then, but when the cyclone hit this year (Feb 2025) we had a small leak into the bathroom ceiling.I contacted A.M.J about the problem and they were more than happy to come back do an inspection and organise a repair at no cost to us.In the end it turned out not to be the new roof installation that was the problem but an older section of roofing.I can't thank Cameron and everyone at A.M.J enough for the service, repair and follow up.
Jeanette Wren
8 months ago
AMJ were great from start to completion of our new roof. Office staff kept us informed throughout the process and the workmen were wonderful. Our roof looks great and the site was left clean and tidy. I would definitely recommend AMJ roofing.

AMJ Metal Roofing just completed our roof and gutter replacement. We are extremely pleased with the results and throughly recommend the company. From the initial quotation right through to the site clean up, the AMJ team were extremely professional, keeping us fully informed every step and delivering on timelines.

A.M.J made getting a new roof simple and enjoyable. Right from the beginning quote to the clean up! Always on time and keeping you fully informed of the process throughout. Very reasonable quote…. no need to look further. We are very happy to give this company 5 stars and would recommend to anybody.
Nathan Yates
4 months ago
For what is a big investment into your biggest asset. I can highly recommend AMJ. The whole team were wonderful to deal with from start to finish. I had them come back to fix something up for me and they were prompt and efficient. Every one I dealt with was great and would encourage anyone who is thinking about taking a leap of faith to give AMJ a go. So happy with the result but most importantly the peace of mind before, during and after knowing I was getting the job done right.
Walter Yeung
4 months ago
It has now been two months since our tiled roof was replaced with Colorbond, and we could not be happier with both the process and the result. The new roof looks stunning and has truly enhanced our home. From the initial quotation to the final completion, AMJ demonstrated exceptional professionalism, organization, and project management. Every member of the team was courteous, efficient, and highly skilled. We were especially impressed when, during a thunderstorm at 3am, someone from AMJ came to inspect our roof—an extraordinary level of care that exceeded our expectations. We are genuinely grateful for the outstanding service and are very pleased we chose AMJ for our roofing project.
John Cutler
4 months ago
I did a lot of research to find a company to replace my tile roof with colorbond. AMJ were professional from office contacts to roofing staff, and job was completely in a timely manner with no issues. Price was acceptable, completed roof work of a good standard.
Simone Leslie
3 months ago
We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

# **Colorbond**   Cladding Installation

[Get a Quote](https://amjmetalroofing.com.au/contact/)

## What Colorbond Wall Cladding Can Add to Your Home (And Who to Call for Colorbond Installations in Gold Coast)

While our brand name is A.M.J Metal Roofing, we also do our fair share of metal wall cladding. Using materials from Colorbond, we can create stunning exterior facades or interior accent walls for your home or business. Colorbond cladding is steel, reinforced with a metallic coating, a treatment, a primer coat of paint, and a coloured top coat of paint. The result is strong, robust metal cladding in unique and striking colours.

Why Choose Colorbond Cladding for Your Gold Coast Home or Office?

So what are the benefits of hiring A.M.J Metal Roofing for a Colorbond cladding installation service in Gold Coast? There are many advantages to using Colorbond, both aesthetic, and practical.

Here are some of the ones that we hear our customers praising most frequently:

- Colorbond cladding is available in a versatile array of colours: One of the top reasons that our customers in Gold Coast love Colorbond cladding is how it opens up the options they have for the look of their home. Colorbond cladding comes in 22 different colours, which is more than what is usually available for building materials. Homeowners who want an unusual colour for the exterior of their homes can achieve the look they want with Colorbond cladding. Similarly, businesses that want to match their front façade to the colours of their brand logo have more options thanks to Colorbond.
- The texture is unique: For exterior purposes, Colorbond cladding might be most desirable due to colour. For interior feature walls, you could achieve the same colour versatility with paint. However, what Colorbond offers that paint can’t is texture. The unique texture of Colorbond cladding can spice up the architecture of a Gold Coast home and give it more character and personality. It looks particularly great in modern style homes.
- Colorbond acts like a suit of armour for your home: Perhaps the most significant benefit of Colorbond wall cladding is how it can protect your home (or business) from elemental threats. Despite being extremely lightweight, Colorbond is very durable, capable of withstanding heavy winds, snow, rain or even hail without denting or chipping. It can also withstand heavy sun exposure, with the exterior topcoat of paint resistant to blistering and flaking. These qualities allow Colorbond to act like a suit of armour around your home, keeping out high heat, piercing cold, moisture from the rain and more. Over time, this extra layer of defence can lower your home’s heating and cooling costs, protect from leaks or water damage and reduce overall maintenance needs.

Schedule Your Gold Coast Colorbond Cladding Installation Today

Are you interested in learning more about Colorbond wall cladding? Do you want to schedule a Colorbond installation in the Gold Coast area?

Either way, A.M.J Metal Roofing can help. You can give us a call on (07) 3823 2773 or 1300 12 7663 to share your enquiry with our sales team.

Terrible experience after dealing with this inept company for six long months. I contacted AMJ Metal Roofing last February to get a quote from their estimator, the very young handsome. Joshua Bain. He is a very presentable young man, who was very professional flying a drone around my property. I accepted his quotation, and that was the start of my problems leading to many unwanted sleepless nights. I was ready to pay the balance of their invoice and in fact, had a bank cheque for the balance in my hand and gave the cheque to the estimator. When there was a fault I withdrew their cheque. In summary I had the Building Inspector at my property on three occasions. The job AMJ did for me was to replace all my guttering and downpipes, and replace my patio. It would be remise of me if I didn't mention Emily. the administration assistant for all her help, as she was very pleasant to deal with both over the phone and in our email conversations. Their, GM, Sarah didn't come into the picture until much later. Sarah made light of the water gushing down from my downpipes. saying it was a "minor" defect. The many problems I encountered with AMJ affected my health, causing me loss of sleep, and my brother, whom I confided in headaches. Initially. when decided on the company I should employ I chose AMJ over Justin from Leakfree Plumbing. What a huge mistake I made. Finally, after the third Building Inspector's report and after six months, he said I could go ahead and pay AMJ, I waited until the recent heavy downpour before I paid AMJ in full last week. I requested a receipt from GM, Sarah and am still waiting. Dealing with AMJ Metal Roofing has been a nightmare for me and regardless of their favourable reviews I recommend you should do yourself a favour and avoid AMJ Metal Roofing like the plague. Linda Petersen

3 months ago

We were very disappointed with our experience with AMJ Metal Roofing. The work was subcontracted without our knowledge, and the subcontractors needed to borrow our equipment and produced questionable workmanship. We only discovered inadequately reinforced battens because we checked the roof ourselves, and the roofers also cracked our external weatherboards with a nail gun.There were multiple ordering issues that caused repeated delays, including incorrect Colorbond sheeting and insufficient screws and gutter guard. The rear bay window was also left out of the original quote despite this being a full roof replacement, creating further delays.Although AMJ later acknowledged some issues and offered limited rectifications (such as gluing the weatherboard cracks, covering the cost of the bay window forgotten in the quote and reinforcing the batten), the overall coordination, communication, and quality control were well below expectations. When we raised these concerns, it took a week to receive a response (which I had to chase), and the main follow-up was simply a request for payment of the overdue invoice.Based on our experience, we would not recommend AMJ Metal Roofing.

meta.og:description: With over twenty colours available, Colorbond metal wall cladding offers a range of options for both the external and internal walls of your home. The sturdy materials offer unique textures paint can't achieve. Contact the experts at A.M.J Metal Roofing to find out what Colorbond wall cladding can do for your home.
